Friend,

**I hate to share this worrisome news with you, but I have no other choice.**

We had a meeting with our fundraising team for next fall’s projections - **_my fundraising numbers are looking dangerously low_**.
**We can't allow this to happen - that's why we are extending our deadline for the next 24 hours**. | [**STEP UP TO GIVE US A CHANCE**](http://links.drmillermeeks.com/u/click?_t=a0459abfcdbb4d8889670e005e3f851c&_m=0a1c4a1c12e6444aa53176f9848f4074&_e=hy37EbEm6sOJ5m59I9x13jjjas7QhCmYfVa_MpS6Ay-XNd0QaMO7yij-MW3JKtXjmu1anputG77BVJBGXKDVcXMbBlCq0ZhdwB1bL2R0jlG1Zy83yrb5ePr3GuNEP4yIrxgpdwg6C6kkBcnIBMDtVzTvLHc5BZKVwn1ykp-vV0OXJ8x6AIRZEfsIc7jrn0Zdz7spp-5eFncyQ-VEC3i3FanjzLvbmFBirJ5L-Ol0D5dZrGZ5gp98_N4v40eQrh6tZBpTZOjyDxcWxS8PPA1WYJ7gYLIxEUBi-E2spbZic5g58plnfZvE4K4cc7TvebfQ1d9-veGBRXGn0SpmnDqL5KbdgFSvFYenWoMCJsFsdnABRbu-oxELhxJH4ppR1EXlUtEgXpcjzGoDVAcT7zHZ0NBzB4vFjuPGcMUs9C-7aJGSpKJVDHv037xEUxhNnnFfFG8OK_JhwBNjSEgCleoX5ev5Ng9FlGPftztwJuGrKtjTCcgYveP_NsbsDzMyuVxezNJ-vxxylIDK2HYWHUfIiA%3D%3D)

This concerns me for an abundance of reasons, but the first and foremost concern for me is the American people.

As inflation and gas prices skyrocket, Americans will struggle immeasurably during the holiday with not being able to afford to visit their families, not being able to afford to celebrate with yummy dinners and gifts, and potentially not affording even their electricity bills.
**It's disturbing that Americans are going through this, while Far-Left Democrafts and our very own president push towards making matters worse with their corrupt legislation.**

**_We need change in 2022 now more than ever._**

**_[If you can donate anything right now towards my re-election efforts, it would go a long way](http://links.drmillermeeks.com/u/click?_t=a0459abfcdbb4d8889670e005e3f851c&_m=0a1c4a1c12e6444aa53176f9848f4074&_e=hy37EbEm6sOJ5m59I9x13jjjas7QhCmYfVa_MpS6Ay-XNd0QaMO7yij-MW3JKtXjmu1anputG77BVJBGXKDVcXMbBlCq0ZhdwB1bL2R0jlG1Zy83yrb5ePr3GuNEP4yIrxgpdwg6C6kkBcnIBMDtVzTvLHc5BZKVwn1ykp-vV0OXJ8x6AIRZEfsIc7jrn0Zdz7spp-5eFncyQ-VEC3i3FanjzLvbmFBirJ5L-Ol0D5dZrGZ5gp98_N4v40eQrh6tZBpTZOjyDxcWxS8PPA1WYJ7gYLIxEUBi-E2spbZic5hTLnx68847zmVQZOEIEi4idjUnqBR3vjZlV6EIKbw_UE4-_XKVnumibMSyjdvxGBYODdVO4vtL_9ZPUuaIFVa4pVSLMX8yKZRj84-YIPJL6CMgSmt2pUrk3UHJAqYw6TnlJIcwjrfudG0zP1Ei6RSHD1G4buU-CTjBxcsinmDiB9SRtvrf6QnEw1wSE5GOKEpOGzMtgu_vXbrEk38rWvLFLeVWfnVEfYaCZVeEfH8Qfg%3D%3D)_**

Without your help, I won't be able to come back from this.

As always, I am grateful for your support.

God Bless,

body:
Strong Families, Good Jobs, Safe Communities

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/kevindellickerforcongress/introducing-kevin-15234252?e=1090c5c412)
Dear ,

No matter the issue, politicians must remember that when they vote, they represent each of us. This is why our campaign is focused on building strong families, creating good jobs, and promoting safe communities. This is how we keep America free.

As a voter, you have a right to know where your candidates stand on the issues and what they will do when they arrive in Congress. Too many politicians today complain about problems without offering any solutions. But rhetoric does not solve the problems that we face, so I want you to know exactly what you can expect from me in Congress. Below is a link to our issues page, which highlights my position on the key issues important to our community.
Kevin Dellicker on the Issues

name: Donald Trump Jr.
subject: A Christmas Card from President Trump + His New Book!
body:
A Must-have for all Patriots
|
---
Friend, President Trump’s New Book, Our Journey Together, is a beautiful photo book which covers President Donald J. Trump’s successful time in the White House—a must-have for all Patriots. **Every photograph in the book was handpicked by President Trump himself.**
| [ ](http://tr.email.donjr.com/c/eJxdUE1PhDAQ_TXlxqYMBcKBg7quybqeVj14aegHS5W2bFuyWX-9BdEYk6btzHvzZuaJpm1zIHWiGsCQZZDNT1FUG6gZZnWZlQBFSTAggqVu1bAR1ry7Dbc66ZuMEYnLHDjuqpxLWWSMFR3GjJGC1CVJhqYPYfQov0Gwi4cUzNoPP5fHaHRWTDz4-J2MVycjRcrteEX5bgqaainUpFG-XRojKOekt5PjMiaf347nIznvcpkaPtBWj4PqriuLx7CNgpH3vReu0pby3ikfdOsj7gTtnNV0dNIrIU2gwU16pL3y1MgLneekXhpB4UfTmhB5UTL2S7cPTy9V-GT3JMLUDEpE4F-yVyKuvt0fJlLZ18Q1YryoYVC-rKKdp8XO2ch19gZVtwhgqQJYPIM_W-4P6emTZI8zBnfxDtdR_hJXjc3qFaBq-wXPGJhs)
---
Walk through President Trump’s historic time in the White House through his eyes, **with captions written and selected by President Trump himself.** This book will show you a behind the scenes look at building the southern border wall; cutting America’s taxes; confirming almost 300 federal judges and 3 Supreme Court justices; rebuilding our military; creating Space Force; dealing with Kim Jong-Un, President Xi, President Putin, battling liberals on two impeachment witch hunts, and much more. Due to Joe Biden’s disastrous leadership, we are facing shortages of every product-including paper. **Place an order today and get this unforgettable book in January 2022 and a Christmas Card from our great President that will arrive in time for Christmas.**

clean_body: A Must-have for all Patriots | Friend, President Trump’s New Book, Our Journey Together, is a beautiful photo book which covers President Donald J. Trump’s successful time in the White House—a must-have for all Patriots. Every photograph in the book was handpicked by President Trump himself. | Walk through President Trump’s historic time in the White House through his eyes, with captions written and selected by President Trump himself. This book will show you a behind the scenes look at building the southern border wall; cutting America’s taxes; confirming almost 300 federal judges and 3 Supreme Court justices; rebuilding our military; creating Space Force; dealing with Kim Jong-Un, President Xi, President Putin, battling liberals on two impeachment witch hunts, and much more. Due to Joe Biden’s disastrous leadership, we are facing shortages of every product-including paper. Place an order today and get this unforgettable book in January 2022 and a Christmas Card from our great President that will arrive in time for Christmas. | |

name: Bryan Steil, Congressman
subject: Big 2A Win
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEIL FOR WISCONSIN, INC
body:
Peter, the right to keep and bear firearms is an inalienable human right. I will always stand up to protect the Second Amendment.
Hi Peter, **Democrats are trying to restrict the Second Amendment as much as possible. Most recently, they attempted to place a red flag provision in our nation 's defense bill.****Thankfully, I was able to work with my colleagues to get this red flag provision stripped from the final version of the bill.** We stopped their scheme from becoming law and prevented them from setting a terrible precedent.It is unconstitutional for the government to restrict your rights. The government is in place to protect our rights. It is as simple as that.**[Help show your support for Second Amendment rights by donating to our campaign. We must take back the House in 2022 if we want to put a stop to the radical left's plans to restrict our rights.](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zjjihlt-idtjvlhlh-r/)**Thank you,Bryan
**--
Bryan Steil**
Congressman [Help Us Fight Back](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zjjihlt-idtjvlhlh-y/) [](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zjjihlt-idtjvlhlh-j/)[](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zjjihlt-idtjvlhlh-t/)[](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zjjihlt-idtjvlhlh-i/) [ Forward ](https://steilforwisconsininc.forwardtomyfriend.com/j-idtjvlhlh-C89B6A88-zjjihlt-l-h) | PAID FOR BY STEIL FOR WISCONSIN, INC

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: We're Suing and We Need Your Help>>
body:
Dear Peter, Big tech corporations like Twitter, Facebook and Google are attacking, silencing, and censoring millions of conservatives. They're targeting any conservative who dares question the government-approved opinions on vaccine mandates and the chaotic 2020 presidential election. And if that wasn't bad enough -- we've now discovered that these _big tech companies were conspiring with and taking orders from powerful liberal politicians!_ That's right -- _**we caught leftists government officials unconstitutionally colluding with "Big Tech" to silence their political opponents**!_ And unless conservatives like you and me take immediate action to stop them, our 1st Amendment rights will be nothing but meaningless words on an old piece of paper... That's why I'm asking you to join our critical fight today... [**Will you rush back an emergency donation of $20 today to help us win our lawsuit against Twitter and these liberal elected officials?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58990560:JDdfCkENB:m:1:3298722022:21C1ADB56ED6C49127A540540028B6DF:r) In case you missed our big announcement on _**Tucker Carlson Tonight**_ , let me explain. In 2018, California created the Office of Election Cybersecurity to "educate voters" with "valid information" on regarding elections. This new government office quickly became a _**political weapon**_ of the far-Left Secretary of State's office which used it to censor and silence conservatives. And conservative lawyer and activist Rogan O'Handley quickly found himself a target. At first Rogan was banned from Twitter for violating "rules about election integrity." Then, when Rogan questioned the chaotic presidential election procedures or the results it was deemed a "violation," and quickly removed from Twitter. _But that 's not the worst of it..._ Recently, new documents prove that radical Leftist operatives working within California's partisan Office of Election Cybersecurity instructed Twitter to censor Rogan. Just look at one exchange: Secretary of State Alex Padilla's staff messaged Twitter and said: _**" We would like this tweet taken down ASAP."**_ Then the next day Twitter responded saying, _" Thank you for reporting, Tweet has been removed. Please don't hesitate to contact me if there is anything else we can do."_ Then it happened... After Rogan dared to question the number of votes Joe Biden got during the election, Twitter permanently banned Rogan! **This proves that liberal government officials used government property to censor the political speech of their enemies****!!** And it's NOT just a private company -- these radical "Big Tech" companies are working hand-in-glove with liberal politicians and government officials to silence and destroy conservatives. Please know that Rogan's Twitter account was wildly popular and had more than 400,000 followers. **_It 's clear that the ONLY reason his account was banned was because the Left was worried that his tweets would damage Joe Biden's image._** In fact, Rogan's opinions didn't just threaten the image of Joe Biden... These radicals were also worried that his tweets would destroy then-California Secretary of State Padilla -- _who was being considered to fill Kamala 's Harris' vacated Senate seat!_ It doesn't take a rocket-scientist to see that this collusion between "Big Tech" and the government to silence conservatives is corrupt and unconstitutional. That's why my team of constitutional lawyers is suing Twitter, Senator Alex Padilla, California Secretary of State Shirly Weber and a handful of other liberal elites for their unconstitutional assault of the 1st Amendment. [**Will you help win this critical lawsuit by sending a generous, tax-deductible contribution of $20, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty today?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58990560:JDdfCkENB:m:1:3298722022:21C1ADB56ED6C49127A540540028B6DF:r) My name is Harmeet Dhillon and you may recognize me from my numerous appearances on _**Newsmax**_ and _**Fox News**_ with **Laura Ingraham, Tucker Carlson,** and **Shannon Bream**. I've been on a lot talking about our numerous battles _and victories_ against the radical Left. We went all the way to the U.S. Supreme Court to get houses of worship reopened and to stop the unconstitutional attacks on people of faith during COVID lockdowns. _**But I never thought the attacks on our individual rights would be this bad.**_ Not only are we suing Twitter -- a multi-billion-dollar corporation -- for its gross violation of Rogan's 1st Amendment right to free speech... We're also taking on former-Secretary of State Alex Padilla for conspiring with Twitter to silence conservatives. And even though we feel great about our case, this will be the hardest legal battle we've ever fought... You see, as a non-profit, everything we do to defend our civil liberties is because of the help and support of conservative patriots like you. And this massive lawsuit is expected to cost us over $1,000,000... [**So, can I count on you to stand up to Twitter and Senator Padilla by making a one-time donation of $20, $35, $50 or more today****?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58990560:JDdfCkENB:m:1:3298722022:21C1ADB56ED6C49127A540540028B6DF:r) This legal battle will define the future of our country... Will we sit back and allow liberal politicians, "Big Tech" corporations, and government bureaucrats to destroy our constitutional freedoms? Or, will we prove that WE, the American people will NOT be silenced! I hope you join us in this critical fight to defend the 1st Amendment by rushing back your urgent tax-deductible donation today. For Freedom, Harmeet K. Dhillon P.S. We have clear evidence that liberal government officials colluded with "Big Tech" billionaires to silence and censor conservatives... That's why we just filed a massive lawsuit against Twitter and the radical bureaucrats to hold these radicals accountable for their illegal actions -- and I need your help to win! [_**So, I 'm asking you to join our critical fight today by rushing back your emergency tax-deductible donation of $20, $35, $50, $100, $250 or more today to stop the silencing of conservatives.**_](pdf) [**DONATE**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58990560:JDdfCkENB:m:1:3298722022:21C1ADB56ED6C49127A540540028B6DF:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58990560:JDdfCkENB:m:1:3298722022:21C1ADB56ED6C49127A540540028B6DF:r) [Please consider supporting our efforts to defend our Constitution with a donation today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58990560:JDdfCkENB:m:1:3298722022:21C1ADB56ED6C49127A540540028B6DF:r) The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free-speech and anti-civil liberties trends.

name: American Update
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8278%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=ShvHqf6QOuRR1qUVTwMesg&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c10563%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=HY8%2fl4MtLxQdxFQqf6t9lw&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c10564%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=IEGHcqw92KOdinlKMkm8bg&sysid=1)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c10564%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=IEGHcqw92KOdinlKMkm8bg&sysid=1)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8278%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=ShvHqf6QOuRR1qUVTwMesg&sysid=1)_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8278%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=ShvHqf6QOuRR1qUVTwMesg&sysid=1)

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future.
_Sponsored message_
This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zavqelh06fq414nok9od3126agas1uebtc90j2o0_rp22sh2s8i66pj4spg6eo30c1h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z644sbgrlpkf4uvthlppjdfpsjk60mi9t1spvoeg_rp22sh2s8i66pj4spg6eo30c1h2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zsefmbgkpmb5lo12vcm7kh3o4sgv55dgs09he4pg_rp22sh2s8i66pj4spg6eo30c1h2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
Trump Train News

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[Click here to unsubscribe](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zb46erm5obcbb77ea0n3q5f3kc44tdlon5tknh98_)

[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zuhnl825rsgpsj778scbbfoguntq9ago9l8k2f00_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or6cjj60pr0c1g649fg)

name: Pro Life Update
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.
This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zmvc406ud2m0vkgthbnntd6kfop3rfgg78mggogo_rp22sh2s8i66pj4spg66o71clh2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zisqo0cg50pb88qcueij0hk1cuvd5kcftj0gia00_rp22sh2s8i66pj4spg66o71clh2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zeu5rlmi6rb2fnqkqmoj2g3fl3ev445mhscgtf90_rp22sh2s8i66pj4spg66o71clh2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

subject: Dr. Fauci is hysterical!

body:
**It 's time to FIRE FAUCI!** **[Chip in if you agree! >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58991608:JMDHEkEN7:m:1:3298722022:79677D202CCCABC5240B6FAFE51F79F3:r)** __ | |
---
Peter,

Here's something Washington won't want you to hear: even the scientist who discovered the omicron variant has called the Biden/Fauci travel ban a "hysterical overreach."

**_The doctor who discovered the new variant wrote an op-ed this week that said that so far, no one's been hospitalized in South Africa. So far, no one's died from this disease. _**

_That 's what I just talked about on Fox News. [**WATCH NOW**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58991608:JMDHEkEN7:m:1:3298722022:79677D202CCCABC5240B6FAFE51F79F3:r)_[** _ >>_**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58991608:JMDHEkEN7:m:1:3298722022:79677D202CCCABC5240B6FAFE51F79F3:r)
__
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58991608:JMDHEkEN7:m:1:3298722022:79677D202CCCABC5240B6FAFE51F79F3:r)
The truth is that the hysterical power-hungry bureaucrats in charge of public health - like Dr. Fauci - don't want you to know what's really happening. They want you scared. They want you to be compliant. And apparently, they want you skipping Christmas unless you line up for a booster.

They want to create fear. They want to indulge hysteria. They want to destroy the economy while they're doing it. These are the last people we need in charge. That's why I'm leading the effort to FIRE FAUCI and restore common sense. Will you join my fight by chipping in now?
__
[**STAND WITH RAND: $25**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58991609:JMDHEkEN7:m:1:3298722022:79677D202CCCABC5240B6FAFE51F79F3:r)

[**STAND WITH RAND: $5**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58991612:JMDHEkEN7:m:1:3298722022:79677D202CCCABC5240B6FAFE51F79F3:r)
The so-called experts have proven too many times that they have no idea what they're doing.

They don't care about COVID - they care about power!

And it's about time we say ENOUGH IS ENOUGH.

It's time for Fauci TO GO before we lose any more time or freedom listening to his hysterical lies.

I have been fighting to dismiss Fauci for a while now, but I know more than ever I can't do it alone.

**I hope you'll chip in now to join the fight:[https://secure.winred.com/randpaul/action-3357636/](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58991608:JMDHEkEN7:m:1:3298722022:79677D202CCCABC5240B6FAFE51F79F3:r)**

In Liberty,
Rand Paul

name: American Defense News
subject: Is socialism on the rise?
body:
Socialism appears to be on the rise in our country, especially among the young, and we want to understand the extent of that sup
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zqt5mlvj45p63c8paabssh3edo6pv73rb2v1bps8_rp22sh2s8i66pj4spi62o31c1h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jm4qj6d9jmpqj7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65t70miprcp5m6co77cb2c6pndc716hir4tr2esprdddkcapmddj3clrm6tblm1rjfkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3c1pb2pjgeipm4ptmchj38o5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)
| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zb8j1jljf3gvqj8b3jas48ofscmu09l41okh2988_rp22sh2s8i66pj4spi62o31c1h2bs)
---
| | | Dear Fellow American, Socialism appears to be on the rise in our country, especially among the young, and we want to understand the extent of that support. That’s why you have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a National Survey on Socialism. With your response, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans—views that we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. Every month, Hillsdale College is reaching millions of Americans with educational outreach. Your response to this National Survey on Socialism is essential in helping us form the most effective strategy in fighting for the future of our country. So please give your views on the political, media, and cultural forces that are promoting socialism in our country today, by completing this National Survey on Socialism: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2021-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zdvh32ho0fkb6uj0n4mp1cg7uromg9vg1jcmga3o_rp22sh2s8i66pj4spi62o31c1h2bs)** There is no doubt in my mind that, especially among younger Americans, socialism is increasingly attractive—and that this threatens the future of American liberty. As Winston Churchill noted, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” And education is the surest way to defeat it. If you agree, please stand with Hillsdale College as we promote intelligent patriotism and defend liberty through education. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Socialism today. | [**Take the Survey**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zvk57j8hnuo97di6gi5tk7d6e607senpdcm8nfmg_rp22sh2s8i66pj4spi62o31c1h2bs)
---
Warm Regards,
Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

name: Charlie Crist
subject: To be frank, I can’t defeat Gov. DeSantis on my own
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
it’ll take all of us working together to throw him out of office |
---

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39588193/320518386/1540480875?refcode=20211212_f_1_fl&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OGVjODBkNi00YzViLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ehkqhOd6Tj0SRbQQyp1WzfSjxKX71plQfABH5fk2IWg=)
---

Friend, _I’m worried about Florida if Gov. DeSantis remains in office._

The past four years have shown his true colors, and I don’t want to find out what will happen if he wins reelection -- and then runs for president.

But I can’t defeat him on my own. No one can. Instead, it’ll take a huge, statewide movement to toss Gov. DeSantis out of office, which is why I’m writing this email.

name: American Update
subject: The Genesis Story Online Course Now on DVD
body:
Hillsdale College’s popular online course, “The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives,” is available on DVD. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8279%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=FHpr2RWM7pyirbncO9%2bdog&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c10577%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=IhLAu33pPuWqbSi2knULyg&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American,

I hope you’re having a good day. I’m writing with some exciting news.

Hillsdale College’s popular online course, **“The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives,”** is available on DVD.

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c10577%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=IhLAu33pPuWqbSi2knULyg&sysid=1)In this six-lecture course, you’ll explore some of the major themes of Genesis, including the complex relationship between God and man, and what it reveals about divine and human nature.

“The Genesis Story” is taught by Hillsdale College professor of English Justin Jackson, who has taught the subject to undergraduate students here at the College for 15 years. This course aims to deepen a student’s theological understanding of the Old Testament by revealing the literary beauty and complexity of the text.

The course begins with a lecture and introduction by the President of Hillsdale College, Dr. Larry P. Arnn, in which he explains why we teach the Book of Genesis at Hillsdale College and why it’s important to both faith and higher education.
< />
Then, Dr. Jackson explains the four relationships that dominate the Book of Genesis: God and creation, God and man, man and man, and man and creation.

These relationships are explored in the narratives of Adam and Eve, Abraham and Sarah, Abraham and Isaac, Jacob and Esau, and finally, Joseph.

This course on DVD is perfect for viewing in your home with your family or for use in small groups such as Bible studies and book clubs.

**For your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of Hillsdale College, you’ll receive the DVD as our thank you.**

To receive your Genesis DVD box set or to give it as a gift, please use the secure link here: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-genesis](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c10578%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Uun81%2f4LsiZbBGIXIbeW9g&sysid=1)**

As you know, Hillsdale College refuses EVERY PENNY of state and federal government funding--even indirectly through student loans and grants. That’s why your support is so crucial.

Your gift helps expand Hillsdale College’s national educational outreach efforts to educate millions of Americans nationwide, including our nation’s youth. Your gift will also help to:
* Increase the number of students taking free online courses, such as “Genesis.”
* Expand the readership of _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s digest of liberty.
* Open and support classical K-12 charter schools through the College’s Barney Charter School Initiative.
* Promote the principles of American constitutionalism through social media and the radio.

Friend, please use the secure link above to make a $100 contribution in support of Hillsdale’s educational outreach, and explore the beauty of the first book of the Bible with your new DVD set of **“The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives.”**

Warm regards,

Bill Gray
Class of 2001
Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach
Hillsdale College
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8279%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=FHpr2RWM7pyirbncO9%2bdog&sysid=1)_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8279%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=FHpr2RWM7pyirbncO9%2bdog&sysid=1)

name: John King
subject: Please, let me explain
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer
body:
While many people could have given up on me, phenomenal public school educators saw my potential and saved my life.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39591066/320531701/1830086357?refcode=BLU-KING-20211212-b-EM&&&&amount=25&refcode2=7ccc5302-585b-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Y2NjNTMwMi01ODViLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dwqi_DQmrMLXgOCylTAC12xI7wRGReG7MbAly_Wj-_w=)
---
| Peter,

In just a moment, [_**I am going to ask you to contribute to my campaign**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39591071/320531707/1830086357?refcode=BLU-KING-20211212-b-EM&&&&amount=25&refcode2=7ccc5302-585b-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Y2NjNTMwMi01ODViLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dwqi_DQmrMLXgOCylTAC12xI7wRGReG7MbAly_Wj-_w=) because we are exactly one month away from the biggest public fundraising deadline of our campaign, and we have a long way to go to hit our $300,000 goal. If you don’t have time to read this whole email, you can contribute [_**here**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39591073/320531711/1830086357?refcode=BLU-KING-20211212-b-EM&&&&amount=25&refcode2=7ccc5302-585b-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Y2NjNTMwMi01ODViLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dwqi_DQmrMLXgOCylTAC12xI7wRGReG7MbAly_Wj-_w=), but I hope you’ll let me explain why your support today is so important.

Honestly, Peter: nothing in my life has come easy.

Both of my parents passed away by the time I was twelve, and like many kids who have experienced trauma, I struggled as a teenager and was kicked out of school.

While many people could have given up on me, phenomenal public school educators saw my potential and saved my life. They inspired me to become a teacher myself— and eventually, to become President Obama’s Secretary of Education.

I was given a second chance, and now I’m running for governor of Maryland to ensure others get the same opportunity to succeed, but I can’t do it without your support. [_**Will you please pitch in today to make sure we hit this ambitious $300,000 goal? Hello,
Today marks 6 years since the Paris Climate Agreement was adopted by 196 countries.
Let me be clear: Climate change is an existential threat. It is a crisis, and it must be of great concern to us all.
As a three-star Admiral in the U.S. Navy, I’ve seen the effects of climate change around the globe – and they are already real and devastating. **Climate change is not some future problem; it is an urgent problem that must be addressed today with the full force of government and American entrepreneurship & ingenuity.**
There are reasons even the Pentagon calls climate change a national security threat.
Here in Iowa, the effects of climate change are already clear. Droughts and flooding are becoming frighteningly more common. Just ask any Iowa farmer if severe weather is impacting their crops right now.
But climate change also presents an opportunity. Iowa can invest in new technologies, create clean energy jobs, and be a leader in the Green Economy. My Republican opponent Chuck Grassley has spent so much time debating whether or not climate change is even real, he’s ignored the chance for Iowa to lead once again.
Maybe it’s because of all the dirty money he’s taken from corporate PACs and special interests.
**In the Senate, I’ll always be a vote for taking real action to fight the climate crisis. But in order to get there, I’ll be counting on grassroots donors like you.**
So today, on the 6th anniversary of the Paris Climate Accord, let us renew our commitment to protect our planet for our children, our grandchildren, and future generations to come.
Thank you for everything you do,
Mike Franken, VADM, U.S. Navy (ret.)

The path to expanding our Democratic Senate majority runs straight through Wisconsin. _CNN_ has already called Ron Johnson the most vulnerable GOP Senator up in 2022, and _The Cook Political Report_ moved Wisconsin from Lean Republican to Toss-Up. We can’t rest easy, however.

Joe Biden won Wisconsin by about 20,000 votes, and in a midterm election, voter turnout is historically lower and historically tough on the party in power. That means we have our work cut out for us.

Sarah Godlewski is the only Democrat in the race who has won two statewide elections in a midterm election — flipping nine Trump counties, and winning by a larger margin than the Governor, Lt. Governor, and the Attorney General in 2018. She can beat Ron Johnson, but she cannot do it alone.

**Your support has helped give Sarah a two-point lead in the polls, and your donation now will help our campaign keep the momentum to take down Ron Johnson. Make a contribution of any amount before our final FEC deadline of the year so we can flip Wisconsin blue.**

Peter, what are your priorities for Congress?

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39593714/320542956/1329859415?refcode=EM_PET_211212issues_N_SB4C_90DO_4_NG_N_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDhhNWQzNC01YzViLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q7GJrKWsqlzgeAu3tBd1tuGG1yknu83j4fJ8dqHWltM=) Peter — **public service is always about putting people first.**

When Shontel was sworn into Congress, she vowed to build a _more just and more equitable future_. We must build an economy that _puts working people first, protects the most vulnerable among us, ensures quality education for every child, and upholds our fundamental right to vote._

With so many challenges facing us, we want to hear directly from you, our grassroots supporters. [**_Our team has set a goal of reaching 500 submissions to our Congressional Priorities Survey this month. So Peter, will you take our short survey and tell us what issues are your top priority._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39593716/320542959/1398708849?refcode=EM_PET_211212issues_N_SB4C_90DO_4_NG_N_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDhhNWQzNC01YzViLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q7GJrKWsqlzgeAu3tBd1tuGG1yknu83j4fJ8dqHWltM=&emci=a0bb9dcd-c859-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=908a5d34-5c5b-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=23746811) | | **[☐ CLIMATE CHANGE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39593718/320542961/1398708849?refcode=EM_PET_211212issues_N_SB4C_90DO_4_NG_N_b1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDhhNWQzNC01YzViLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q7GJrKWsqlzgeAu3tBd1tuGG1yknu83j4fJ8dqHWltM=&emci=a0bb9dcd-c859-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=908a5d34-5c5b-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=23746811)**

Thank you for your continued support,

Shontel Brown for Congress

As a Cuyahoga County Council member and Chairwoman of the Cuyahoga County Democratic Party, Shontel Brown has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. Now, as the Congresswoman for Ohio’s 11th District, she will fight for affordable quality health care, jobs that pay fair wages, a strong public education system, and equity and justice for all. **Will you join her and be the change we need?**

name: Abby Finkenauer
subject: I have an update...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
We can't afford to miss this opportunity
| | |
---
**Sen. Chuck Grassley (R-IA) recently announced he's running for reelection and was endorsed by Donald Trump at a rally here in Iowa. I fully intend to defeat him and flip Iowa blue, Peter – but I need you with me. Here's the latest:**
**First** , the momentum is on _our_ side. Nearly two-thirds of Iowa voters _don't_ want to reelect Sen. Grassley, which means we have a unique opportunity and advantage that we must harness to flip this Senate seat blue.
**But** defeating Sen. Grassley – in what the Des Moines Register is calling a "marquee matchup" – will come down to resources, and the campaign arm of the Senate Republicans has already hauled in $85 million this year. They are well equipped to protect vulnerable incumbents like Sen. Grassley and attack competitive challengers like me.
**So right now,** ahead of our mid-month fundraising deadline, my team and I need to raise $50,000. This is a grassroots campaign, and hitting these goals and building up resources is how we will flip Iowa blue.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39595911/320547203/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk464-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMTE1MTc5OC01ZDViLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AQce4kSvM3OqkzInTSiLHwaEQEhTz3hGb1mpM4fIfU8=)
| | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39595913/320547232/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk464-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMTE1MTc5OC01ZDViLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AQce4kSvM3OqkzInTSiLHwaEQEhTz3hGb1mpM4fIfU8=)
---
I fully intend to win this race, and if we defeat Sen. Grassley and flip Iowa blue, then Democrats are virtually guaranteed to hold the Senate majority. So please, can I count on you to help me hit this mid-month grassroots fundraising goal?
**[Donate $5 or more now – whatever you can spare to fuel our fight against Sen. Grassley and the GOP – so we can win in Iowa and protect our Democratic Senate majority. Every donation gets us one step closer to expanding Senate control and getting working Iowans the leadership they deserve!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39595916/320547261/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk464-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMTE1MTc5OC01ZDViLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AQce4kSvM3OqkzInTSiLHwaEQEhTz3hGb1mpM4fIfU8=)**
Thanks for all you do.

– Abby

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Biden-led SCOTUS Commission Leaves Stance to Court-Packing
body:

name: Liz Walters, Team ODP
subject: Taking a deep dive into our fundraising
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
|
Listen, December is typically a slow fundraising month with the holidays around the corner. But I was taking a look in ActBlue yesterday, and I have to say, I'm worried. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39599492/320558236/1492199982?refcode=em21_211212_mm1_fndd_gq_act___lw_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211212_mm1_fndd_gq_act___lw_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYWRkMjE5Ni02NDViLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4r97E7lkwhpKGxRhuXZqD-HoJFBPfhP2A6jkegAaeng=) Over the last few days, our online fundraising has been inconsistent. That's not what we want to see as we continue to build the infrastructure we need to flip Ohio blue in 2022. If we want a fighting chance to win Ohio's open Senate seat, take back the governor's office, and elect Democrats up and down the ticket, we have to turn this around.

After talking to the rest of the ODP team, we agreed that we need to ramp up our fundraising over the next week -- starting with hitting our $9,000 mid-month fundraising goal. If we can hit this goal, we'll be back on track for the month.

[**Friend, that's why we need your help right away. Donate $5 or more right now to help us hit our $9,000 December mid-month fundraising goal before our deadline on Wednesday at midnight.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39599493/320558237/1492199982?refcode=em21_211212_mm1_fndd_gq_act___lw_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211212_mm1_fndd_gq_act___lw_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYWRkMjE5Ni02NDViLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4r97E7lkwhpKGxRhuXZqD-HoJFBPfhP2A6jkegAaeng=)

Thanks for all of your support,

Liz

Liz Walters
Chair
Ohio Democratic Party

The Ohio Democratic Party is working year-round to elect Democrats who will fight for working families all over the Buckeye State. We have the chance to flip not only Ohio's open US Senate seat, but to elect a Democratic governor as well. **Will you pitch in $10 or more right away? Every dollar you give helps build a blue Ohio.** [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39599494/320558238/1492199982?refcode=em21_211212_mm1_fndd_gq_act___lw_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211212_mm1_fndd_gq_act___lw_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYWRkMjE5Ni02NDViLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4r97E7lkwhpKGxRhuXZqD-HoJFBPfhP2A6jkegAaeng=)

name: Senator Marco Rubio
subject: I'm begging you.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
I'm on track to miss my Mid-Month goal and be outraised for the Quarter... again. I hate to bother you about this, but I promise it's important. My race will determine control of the Senate, and the fate of Trump's legacy.
|
---
| | | Peter, I can't believe this.

It's Marco, I'm on track to miss my Mid-Month goal and be outraised for the Quarter... again. I hate to bother you about this, but I promise it's important. My race will determine control of the Senate, and the fate of Trump's legacy. **[I'm pleading, will you give $18 to retake the Senate?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58991630:JmT7dkEZN:m:1:3298722022:1F76C645B1B761823C5F3AC97FFECDC3:r "I’m pleading, will you give $18 to retake the Senate?")**

| | | [DONATE $18 >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58991630:JmT7dkEZN:m:1:3298722022:1F76C645B1B761823C5F3AC97FFECDC3:r "DONATE $18 >>")
---

body:

# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39599727/320559062/635930916?refcode=AU_BBD_EG_GEN_GEN_AC_20211212_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ODhiYzVkYS02NDViLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9vZnn2EDBawYhatqinP2X85qGGMYqGzdfokzGdqUJPo=)

name: Alex Lasry
subject: Creating good jobs and raising wages
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lasry for Wisconsin
body:
Progressive values are good business.

---
Peter,

We have shown that progressive values are good for business and the economy. In building the Bucks’ arena and the surrounding Deer District, we brought together a public/private partnership that emphasized workforce development. At least 43% of workers on the arena project consisted of people underemployed or unemployed over the past five years, and 30% of service contracts were awarded to minority and disadvantaged businesses.

We also don’t just talk about a $15 minimum wage, we turned our promise into action. The Bucks pay all our employees at the Bucks’ Arena family-sustaining wages because we know that paying our employees fairly is not only the right thing to do, but also because we know the truth: **_Progressive values are good business._**

We created a great business, brought economic opportunity to Wisconsin, and prioritized progressive values. My record shows that I’m a proven leader, and in the Senate, I will join Tammy Baldwin and be a voice for the workers of Wisconsin. But I need your help.

Can you make a contribution of $10 to our campaign today to help bring a proven leader to the Senate? **You can use this link to give:[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lasry_dec2021](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39599914/320560297/1434030581?refcode=EM_FR_211212FR_N_AL_90DA_4_NG_N_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkN2E5NTY2Ny02NTViLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q65j5YQOSPT0CEbcMRNlkhfCy8047zZ4axb5d2R1Kys=)**

Thank you,

Alex

name: Bob Lorinser
subject: Friends , this is how I responded to Jack Bergman's attacks...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR
body:
Are people in your area fed up with Jack Bergman's divisive politicking? **Jack Bergman has a lot to say about our campaign.** **Here's how we're responding** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39600406/320563080/1277889215?express_lane=true&amount=29&refcode=express_lane_29&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NmJmMzZjNy02NzViLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vtwuEwb8C4uC8H4876w94FZ0VUtIHCMnyjRQlD_HFl4=) We have 3 days until our next fundraising deadline. My grassroots campaign is funded 100% by individual donors like you. Can you pitch in? [MAKE A CONTRIBUTION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39600407/320563081/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NmJmMzZjNy02NzViLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vtwuEwb8C4uC8H4876w94FZ0VUtIHCMnyjRQlD_HFl4=) [ONE-CLICK $29 DONATION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39600408/320563082/1277889215?express_lane=true&amount=29&refcode=express_lane_29&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NmJmMzZjNy02NzViLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vtwuEwb8C4uC8H4876w94FZ0VUtIHCMnyjRQlD_HFl4=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39600409/320563083/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NmJmMzZjNy02NzViLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vtwuEwb8C4uC8H4876w94FZ0VUtIHCMnyjRQlD_HFl4=) Friends, I am sticking to my promise that I would keep my campaign positive and honest. But, I also told constituents that I would hold my opponent accountable and address fallacies and lies at every opportunity. Unfortunately, when running against Jack Bergman, keeping him honest is a full-time job. Here are some of the issues we took up with Jack this week: | |
---
My opponent suggested I'm "delusional" when I said improving the economy requires us to [**get serious about COVID-19 mitigation.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39600410/320563084/-1859359936?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NmJmMzZjNy02NzViLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vtwuEwb8C4uC8H4876w94FZ0VUtIHCMnyjRQlD_HFl4=&emci=500742cc-5f5b-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=46bf36c7-675b-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=15167427) His opinion goes against scientists, conservative economists, and common sense.

I, too, disagreed with shutdowns and I publicly told the governor so — but I did it **respectfully** while offering sound, appropriate alternatives. My opponent exploited the crisis then voted against relief for small businesses.

**I don't know who he's working for,**
**but I'm interested in actually solving problems. **

In the same attack, he also claimed he had encouraged his constituents to get vaccinated. But, before this, he rarely mentioned his choice to get vaccinated and only haphazardly asked others to. At nearly every opportunity, he pushes all the narratives that cause vaccine hesitancy.

If you contract COVID-19, you are ten times more likely to be hospitalized if you're unvaccinated. I don’t support federal vaccine mandates for civilians, but I highly encourage everyone to get vaccinated. Our message is consistent and clear. My opponent's message is contradictory and confusing.

**And, the political grandstanding is astounding.**

His latest – continually hammering his illogical opposition to the American Rescue Plan, the Bipartisan Infrastructure Plan, and the Build it Back Better Plan.

Look, I understand if you voted for my opponent hoping he would be fiscally conservative. He isn’t, but I will be responsible with taxpayer dollars.

In his last two terms, his votes added **$7.8 trillion** to the national debt, including unfunded tax cuts to corporations, costing taxpayers trillions with little to no benefit to the average citizen.

**Jack Bergman isn't fiscally conservative.**
**He's an obstructionist. **

While we publish and speak about real solutions to issues directly affecting Northern Michiganders and Yoopers, my opponent's focus is elsewhere.

Even his recent "Hunter Biden Amendment" to the Defense Spending bill was rejected. I agree family should not profit off the President. Who wouldn't? But, his decidedly partisan grandstanding is behavior unbecoming of a Representative.

**This is amateur stuff, folks.**
**It is not how we're supposed to legislate. **

Unfortunately, this is how he campaigns — with dishonesty a division, but his days of wedging the great people of the district against each other are over, not to mention his desire to stand in opposition of the will of the people by invalidating the 2018 presidential election.

When asked if regrets his vote to undermine our Democracy. My opponent responded, "Short answer 'No.' Long answer 'Hell no.'"

The vast majority of voters and the objective data — including conservative-led audits — do not subscribe to the myth of widespread voter fraud. His response is despicable.

**Doubling down on a lie isn't strength.**
**It's dishonorable. **

Friends, I hope it's becoming more clear why we have to defeat Jack Bergman. To do that, I need you. Currently, I'm running in the Democratic primary unopposed – and fundraising is going well. We need campaign finance reform, but every day, I'm humbled by everyone's generosity. I'd much rather spend my time with you, talking about the issues than raising money.

Until I can get into Congress and fight for that, I'm running against GOP corporate PAC checks and dark money. Remaining competitive against Jack is largely dependent on your financial support. Campaigning in the largest district east of the Mississippi requires a lot of resources and travel.

Can you pitch in and help us get to our next goal?

With gratitude,

clean_body: Are people in your area fed up with Jack Bergman's divisive politicking? Jack Bergman has a lot to say about our campaign. Here's how we're responding = We have 3 days until our next fundraising deadline. My grassroots campaign is funded 100% by individual donors like you. Can you pitch in? = = = Friends, I am sticking to my promise that I would keep my campaign positive and honest. But, I also told constituents that I would hold my opponent accountable and address fallacies and lies at every opportunity. Unfortunately, when running against Jack Bergman, keeping him honest is a full-time job. Here are some of the issues we took up with Jack this week: | | My opponent suggested I'm "delusional" when I said improving the economy requires us to His opinion goes against scientists, conservative economists, and common sense. I, too, disagreed with shutdowns and I publicly told the governor so — but I did it respectfully while offering sound, appropriate alternatives. My opponent exploited the crisis then voted against relief for small businesses. I don't know who he's working for, but I'm interested in actually solving problems. In the same attack, he also claimed he had encouraged his constituents to get vaccinated. But, before this, he rarely mentioned his choice to get vaccinated and only haphazardly asked others to. At nearly every opportunity, he pushes all the narratives that cause vaccine hesitancy. If you contract COVID-19, you are ten times more likely to be hospitalized if you're unvaccinated. I don’t support federal vaccine mandates for civilians, but I highly encourage everyone to get vaccinated. Our message is consistent and clear. My opponent's message is contradictory and confusing. And, the political grandstanding is astounding. His latest – continually hammering his illogical opposition to the American Rescue Plan, the Bipartisan Infrastructure Plan, and the Build it Back Better Plan. Look, I understand if you voted for my opponent hoping he would be fiscally conservative. He isn’t, but I will be responsible with taxpayer dollars. In his last two terms, his votes added $7.8 trillion to the national debt, including unfunded tax cuts to corporations, costing taxpayers trillions with little to no benefit to the average citizen. Jack Bergman isn't fiscally conservative. He's an obstructionist. While we publish and speak about real solutions to issues directly affecting Northern Michiganders and Yoopers, my opponent's focus is elsewhere. Even his recent "Hunter Biden Amendment" to the Defense Spending bill was rejected. I agree family should not profit off the President. Who wouldn't? But, his decidedly partisan grandstanding is behavior unbecoming of a Representative. This is amateur stuff, folks. It is not how we're supposed to legislate. Unfortunately, this is how he campaigns — with dishonesty a division, but his days of wedging the great people of the district against each other are over, not to mention his desire to stand in opposition of the will of the people by invalidating the 2018 presidential election. When asked if regrets his vote to undermine our Democracy. My opponent responded, "Short answer 'No.' Long answer 'Hell no.'" The vast majority of voters and the objective data — including conservative-led audits — do not subscribe to the myth of widespread voter fraud. His response is despicable. Doubling down on a lie isn't strength. It's dishonorable. Friends, I hope it's becoming more clear why we have to defeat Jack Bergman. To do that, I need you. Currently, I'm running in the Democratic primary unopposed – and fundraising is going well. We need campaign finance reform, but every day, I'm humbled by everyone's generosity. I'd much rather spend my time with you, talking about the issues than raising money. Until I can get into Congress and fight for that, I'm running against GOP corporate PAC checks and dark money. Remaining competitive against Jack is largely dependent on your financial support. Campaigning in the largest district east of the Mississippi requires a lot of resources and travel. Can you pitch in and help us get to our next goal? With gratitude, — Dr. Bob = | We have 3 days until our next fundraising deadline. name: ICYMI News
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nati
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zosqn77p02ofbiijivnk8a8e9krnfqktgucl6iog_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sph62o74s3h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zbqq5v5bteuiha81pnnms59jeicjncfbdur38q4o_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sph62o74s3h2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zb2p00oo663opda96c0h9t5bf85lklgg13vfu9po_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sph62o74s3h2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
[**Visit ICYMI News**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zm6cvmvdj00kpm5fmcbdepcm9ck6750pp1r9r7ao_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sph62o74s3h2bs)

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[Click here to change your subscription preferences](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zp6osh08d6fqei13balaj67pkd7l6ib10itajpu8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9jle8r7ccjkm1on9dtjmppq9dhkumqb7d9neppqcdtlmuju1df34kqu2c3neior3d5medjm05plmgqb3ct66uqr69bls2on2s3isujqact4moqfbd5jmkrncst66uqrf8pnm9qrf9bjmpqn4djm69qb0sbkmuprf972u9hfacjgm3gn0pthcaq38s5jmph78pb0mgp78shh64q7cs9hmko62cpn69j69p30cup238h1e8he4933cpiecoj1c3ie1oh5u)

name: Samantha Gross
subject: it’s my job
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Van Hollen for Senate
body:
| |
---
As Senator Van Hollen’s Finance Director, it’s my job to make sure he has the resources he needs to wage a winning re-election campaign that is able to respond to whatever the Senate Republican Campaign Committee and its special interest Super PACs do to try to stop us. With a Senate tied at 50-50 — with Vice President Harris as the tie-breaker — and just ONE seat deciding who will control the Senate next year, there’s no room for error. And Mitch McConnell has made it clear he’s determined to recruit a well-funded opponent to run against Chris here in Maryland to help Mitch FLIP the Senate RED in November. We need everyone who cares about the future of our democracy to join this people-powered campaign and help us make sure Chris stays in the Senate to keep fighting for our values and holding the line against a disastrous McConnell-controlled agenda. [Can I count on you to join our end-of-year push by making a donation of any size? clean_body: | | As Senator Van Hollen’s Finance Director, it’s my job to make sure he has the resources he needs to wage a winning re-election campaign that is able to respond to whatever the Senate Republican Campaign Committee and its special interest Super PACs do to try to stop us. With a Senate tied at 50-50 — with Vice President Harris as the tie-breaker — and just ONE seat deciding who will control the Senate next year, there’s no room for error. And Mitch McConnell has made it clear he’s determined to recruit a well-funded opponent to run against Chris here in Maryland to help Mitch FLIP the Senate RED in November. We need everyone who cares about the future of our democracy to join this people-powered campaign and help us make sure Chris stays in the Senate to keep fighting for our values and holding the line against a disastrous McConnell-controlled agenda. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = We cannot be complacent. | | | **“Is Susan Wild worried yet?”**

-National Republican Campaign Committee
---
| [DEFEND SUSAN ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39600944/320565891/-1089111386?refcode=BLU-SWC-20211212-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YmViMzBlNC02OTViLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kT_QiuOdGX7ZYLVsjyUKpCl4DuRfY_qEh9TBDhanzTM=)
---
Peter —

But I also know that House seats like mine are in serious jeopardy as we head into the midterm elections unless folks like you step up.**

So we’re staying laser-focused on the task at hand: _hitting our December fundraising goal so we can defend our majority in 2022._

#

We know these emails pile up, so we promise this will be the shortest one you read today.
$3 — that's the amount we're asking you to pitch in to Malcolm Kenyatta's campaign for Senate. Here's why:

2. It's never been more important for us to elect pro-choice leaders who will fight to protect Roe and eliminate the filibuster.
3. Our campaign is funded by grassroots support from folks like you. Malcolm's not taking a cent from corporate PACs.

name: Max Steiner
subject: Help keep our ads running.
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39602051/320572112/390307162?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NWFmNzE1OS02ZTViLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A4F4yawGl72TN8Lm9DrOohes3gZafiew73mAnN-JMW8=)
Friend,

In a moment, I'm going to ask you to **[chip in $3](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39602052/320572113/-209993060?refcode=em-12.12.21-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NWFmNzE1OS02ZTViLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A4F4yawGl72TN8Lm9DrOohes3gZafiew73mAnN-JMW8=)** to support our digital outreach efforts. But first, let me pull back the curtain a bit on our current strategy.

I've been criss-crossing the district meeting with local Democratic parties, community groups and leaders, and voters here in the North State. It's a lot of ground to cover, and while the personal touches are important to the type of campaign I'm committed to running, the reality is that I'll never be able to reach every voter one-on-one -- no matter how long I spend on the road.

**That's why we're building a robust digital program to spread the word about my campaign.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39602053/320572114/-209993060?refcode=em-12.12.21-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NWFmNzE1OS02ZTViLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A4F4yawGl72TN8Lm9DrOohes3gZafiew73mAnN-JMW8=)
Right now, we're running online ads like these to raise awareness (_and money!_) for our effort to replace far-right seditionist Doug LaMalfa. Supporters and donors are responding with enthusiasm, but in order for us to keep these ads up, we need to meet the mark on every fundraising goal.

|

| | | Patriot,

We're so excited to announce our new donor club that's exclusive to our top 1,200 patriots - The **Trump Diamond Club** , and you're invited to be a founding member!

Members of this exclusive club will get special discounts on GOP merchandise, receive insider memos with the latest election news, and hear from GOP Leaders, like Kevin McCarthy, Newt Gingrich, and Donald Trump Jr.

We truly appreciate your continued support and hope that you will join us in our new Trump Diamond Club. Remember, you only have 1 hour to accept!

House Conservatives

name: Team Holly
subject: Greene, Gaetz, and Gosar conspired with insurrectionists
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Holly for Congress
body:
https://www.holly4congress.com/ [https://www.holly4congress.com/]
Peter, yesterday Marjorie Taylor Greene self proclaimed herself as the “face of America.”
Let’s make one thing clear: she is not.
We’ve had a void in leadership for far too long. Marge parachuted into GA-14 for an easy win. In 2020, she ran her Dem opponent out of town. Northwest Georgians don’t align with Marjorie Taylor Greene, we simply had no other option. That will change next year.
I won’t back down and I won’t abandon the folks of GA-14. This district wants affordable childcare, accessible broadband internet, and we want our roads fixed. Marjorie Taylor Greene’s far right values don’t represent us and her lack of accomplishments leave us in the dust. In 2022, we will fire Marjorie Taylor Greene.
Chip in $14 today if you’d like to see this happen. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc?refcode=em1210]
Let’s get back to work,
Holly McCormack.
