name: American Defense News
subject: The Genesis Story" Online Course Now on DVD
body:
I’m writing with some exciting news. Hillsdale College’s popular online course, “The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narr
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zn0gjrl11ta304uplouc0bn96v51812iqp0koqm8_rp22sh2s8i66pj4spj64o34cjh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jm4qj6d9jmpqj7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65s5jcqp74cphe6pneob0m9g78phgcupjcobgm5hbaopi6dqm7c72ccrm2ctkmpgefkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj30t5l6oo75cj66hib6p77m2qmash5u)
This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zo4qbmh2d5hasgv105vkjjltd3mg5ivtm4labaa0_rp22sh2s8i66pj4spj64o34cjh2bs) Dear Fellow American,

I hope you’re having a good day. I’m writing with some exciting news.

Hillsdale College’s popular online course, **“The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives,”** is available on DVD.

[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z8e06d994ujtdd3ing5lj1dlk4ba5lvko013icjo_rp22sh2s8i66pj4spj64o34cjh2bs)In this six-lecture course, you’ll explore some of the major themes of Genesis, including the complex relationship between God and man, and what it reveals about divine and human nature.

“The Genesis Story” is taught by Hillsdale College professor of English Justin Jackson, who has taught the subject to undergraduate students here at the College for 15 years. This course aims to deepen a student’s theological understanding of the Old Testament by revealing the literary beauty and complexity of the text.

The course begins with a lecture and introduction by the President of Hillsdale College, Dr. Larry P. Arnn, in which he explains why we teach the Book of Genesis at Hillsdale College and why it’s important to both faith and higher education.

Then, Dr. Jackson explains the four relationships that dominate the Book of Genesis: God and creation, God and man, man and man, and man and creation.

These relationships are explored in the narratives of Adam and Eve, Abraham and Sarah, Abraham and Isaac, Jacob and Esau, and finally, Joseph.

This course on DVD is perfect for viewing in your home with your family or for use in small groups such as Bible studies and book clubs.

**For your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of Hillsdale College, you’ll receive the DVD as our thank you.**

To receive your Genesis DVD box set or to give it as a gift, please use the secure link here: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-genesis](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z8uroedp5bo45q0d5i6ijodm77hs7ot3rql1a16g_rp22sh2s8i66pj4spj64o34cjh2bs)**

As you know, Hillsdale College refuses EVERY PENNY of state and federal government funding—even indirectly through student loans and grants. That’s why your support is so crucial.

Your gift helps expand Hillsdale College’s national educational outreach efforts to educate millions of Americans nationwide, including our nation’s youth. Your gift will also help to:
* Increase the number of students taking free online courses, such as “Genesis.”
* Expand the readership of _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s digest of liberty.
* Open and support classical K-12 charter schools through the College’s Barney Charter School Initiative.
* Promote the principles of American constitutionalism through social media and the radio.

Friend, please use the secure link above to make a $100 contribution in support of Hillsdale’s educational outreach, and explore the beauty of the first book of the Bible with your new DVD set of **“The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives.”**

Warm regards,

Bill Gray
Class of 2001
Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach
Hillsdale College
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for American Defense News, [please use this preferences page](http://e.americandefensenews.com/prefs/9z2z6q3kahetn8mib8sk5cusklifs8sbdbsu8qod198).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z8ktnmomiqptl90ue77higkctahmqg02e1sre9hg_rp22sh2s8i66pj4spj64o34cjh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

The truth of the matter is that Derrick Van Orden is dangerous. He believes in lies -- including that the 2020 election was stolen -- and was on the grounds of the Capitol on January 6.

But he’s a major threat -- he came within a few votes of winning last time he ran for Congress. And now the National Republican Congressional Committee just named him to their “Young Guns” program, which means he’ll have their full financial backing. And he's also been endorsed by Donald Trump!

So that’s why I need your help. I know with supporters like you by my side, I can defeat him and represent western Wisconsin with the dignity and respect it deserves. But we need to make sure we can compete with Derrick Van Orden’s resources.

**[Will you be one of the people we need to chip in $5 today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39603529/320579656/-1995343361?refcode=ABD_EM_FR_2021.12.12_b1_MMD-1_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&amount=5&utm_campaign=abd_em_fr_2021.12.12_b1_mmd-1_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZDQ4OTE4YS03OTViLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MFqBjfxFMBl8Uo737AcET8ejnlg0PEEyqvSBLbrrdUQ=)**

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: I never thought the attacks on our individual rights would be this bad.
body:
Dear Peter, Big tech corporations like Twitter, Facebook and Google are attacking, silencing, and censoring millions of conservatives. They're targeting any conservative who dares question the government-approved opinions on vaccine mandates and the chaotic 2020 presidential election. And if that wasn't bad enough -- we've now discovered that these _big tech companies were conspiring with and taking orders from powerful liberal politicians!_ That's right -- _**we caught leftists government officials unconstitutionally colluding with "Big Tech" to silence their political opponents**!_ And unless conservatives like you and me take immediate action to stop them, our 1st Amendment rights will be nothing but meaningless words on an old piece of paper... That's why I'm asking you to join our critical fight today... [**Will you rush back an emergency donation of $20 today to help us win our lawsuit against Twitter and these liberal elected officials?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58990473:JtJcckENz:m:1:3253819041:529E81B762C2995A258E058E5F8D8948:r) In case you missed our big announcement on _**Tucker Carlson Tonight**_ , let me explain. In 2018, California created the Office of Election Cybersecurity to "educate voters" with "valid information" on regarding elections. This new government office quickly became a _**political weapon**_ of the far-Left Secretary of State's office which used it to censor and silence conservatives. And conservative lawyer and activist Rogan O'Handley quickly found himself a target. At first Rogan was banned from Twitter for violating "rules about election integrity." Then, when Rogan questioned the chaotic presidential election procedures or the results it was deemed a "violation," and quickly removed from Twitter. _But that 's not the worst of it..._ Recently, new documents prove that radical Leftist operatives working within California's partisan Office of Election Cybersecurity instructed Twitter to censor Rogan. Just look at one exchange: Secretary of State Alex Padilla's staff messaged Twitter and said: _**" We would like this tweet taken down ASAP."**_ Then the next day Twitter responded saying, _" Thank you for reporting, Tweet has been removed. Please don't hesitate to contact me if there is anything else we can do."_ Then it happened... After Rogan dared to question the number of votes Joe Biden got during the election, Twitter permanently banned Rogan! **This proves that liberal government officials used government property to censor the political speech of their enemies****!!** And it's NOT just a private company -- these radical "Big Tech" companies are working hand-in-glove with liberal politicians and government officials to silence and destroy conservatives. Please know that Rogan's Twitter account was wildly popular and had more than 400,000 followers. **_It 's clear that the ONLY reason his account was banned was because the Left was worried that his tweets would damage Joe Biden's image._** In fact, Rogan's opinions didn't just threaten the image of Joe Biden... These radicals were also worried that his tweets would destroy then-California Secretary of State Padilla -- _who was being considered to fill Kamala 's Harris' vacated Senate seat!_ It doesn't take a rocket-scientist to see that this collusion between "Big Tech" and the government to silence conservatives is corrupt and unconstitutional. That's why my team of constitutional lawyers is suing Twitter, Senator Alex Padilla, California Secretary of State Shirly Weber and a handful of other liberal elites for their unconstitutional assault of the 1st Amendment. [**Will you help win this critical lawsuit by sending a generous, tax-deductible contribution of $20, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty today?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58990473:JtJcckENz:m:1:3253819041:529E81B762C2995A258E058E5F8D8948:r) My name is Harmeet Dhillon and you may recognize me from my numerous appearances on _**Newsmax**_ and _**Fox News**_ with **Laura Ingraham, Tucker Carlson,** and **Shannon Bream**. I've been on a lot talking about our numerous battles _and victories_ against the radical Left. We went all the way to the U.S. Supreme Court to get houses of worship reopened and to stop the unconstitutional attacks on people of faith during COVID lockdowns. _**But I never thought the attacks on our individual rights would be this bad.**_ Not only are we suing Twitter -- a multi-billion-dollar corporation -- for its gross violation of Rogan's 1st Amendment right to free speech... We're also taking on former-Secretary of State Alex Padilla for conspiring with Twitter to silence conservatives. And even though we feel great about our case, this will be the hardest legal battle we've ever fought... You see, as a non-profit, everything we do to defend our civil liberties is because of the help and support of conservative patriots like you. And this massive lawsuit is expected to cost us over $1,000,000... [**So, can I count on you to stand up to Twitter and Senator Padilla by making a one-time donation of $20, $35, $50 or more today****?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58990473:JtJcckENz:m:1:3253819041:529E81B762C2995A258E058E5F8D8948:r) This legal battle will define the future of our country... Will we sit back and allow liberal politicians, "Big Tech" corporations, and government bureaucrats to destroy our constitutional freedoms? Or, will we prove that WE, the American people will NOT be silenced! I hope you join us in this critical fight to defend the 1st Amendment by rushing back your urgent tax-deductible donation today. For Freedom, Harmeet K. Dhillon P.S. We have clear evidence that liberal government officials colluded with "Big Tech" billionaires to silence and censor conservatives... That's why we just filed a massive lawsuit against Twitter and the radical bureaucrats to hold these radicals accountable for their illegal actions -- and I need your help to win! [_**So, I 'm asking you to join our critical fight today by rushing back your emergency tax-deductible donation of $20, $35, $50, $100, $250 or more today to stop the silencing of conservatives.**_](pdf) [**DONATE**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58990473:JtJcckENz:m:1:3253819041:529E81B762C2995A258E058E5F8D8948:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58990473:JtJcckENz:m:1:3253819041:529E81B762C2995A258E058E5F8D8948:r) [Please consider supporting our efforts to defend our Constitution with a donation today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58990473:JtJcckENz:m:1:3253819041:529E81B762C2995A258E058E5F8D8948:r) The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free-speech and anti-civil liberties trends.
(C) The Center for American Liberty | [www.libertycenter.org](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58990474:JtJcckENz:m:1:3253819041:529E81B762C2995A258E058E5F8D8948:r) PO Box 2510, Leesburg, VA 20177

These radicals were also worried that his tweets would destroy then-California Secretary of State Padilla -- who was being considered to fill Kamala 's Harris' vacated Senate seat! It doesn't take a rocket-scientist to see that this collusion between "Big Tech" and the government to silence conservatives is corrupt and unconstitutional. That's why my team of constitutional lawyers is suing Twitter, Senator Alex Padilla, California Secretary of State Shirly Weber and a handful of other liberal elites for their unconstitutional assault of the 1st Amendment. My name is Harmeet Dhillon and you may recognize me from my numerous appearances on Newsmax and Fox News with Laura Ingraham, Tucker Carlson, and Shannon Bream. I've been on a lot talking about our numerous battles and victories against the radical Left. We went all the way to the U.S. Supreme Court to get houses of worship reopened and to stop the unconstitutional attacks on people of faith during COVID lockdowns. But I never thought the attacks on our individual rights would be this bad. Not only are we suing Twitter -- a multi-billion-dollar corporation -- for its gross violation of Rogan's 1st Amendment right to free speech... We're also taking on former-Secretary of State Alex Padilla for conspiring with Twitter to silence conservatives. And even though we feel great about our case, this will be the hardest legal battle we've ever fought... You see, as a non-profit, everything we do to defend our civil liberties is because of the help and support of conservative patriots like you. And this massive lawsuit is expected to cost us over $1,000,000... This legal battle will define the future of our country... Will we sit back and allow liberal politicians, "Big Tech" corporations, and government bureaucrats to destroy our constitutional freedoms? Or, will we prove that WE, the American people will NOT be silenced! I hope you join us in this critical fight to defend the 1st Amendment by rushing back your urgent tax-deductible donation today. For Freedom, Harmeet K. Dhillon P.S. We have clear evidence that liberal government officials colluded with "Big Tech" billionaires to silence and censor conservatives... That's why we just filed a massive lawsuit against Twitter and the radical bureaucrats to hold these radicals accountable for their illegal actions -- and I need your help to win! pdf The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free-speech and anti-civil liberties trends. | | Did you hear the news, team? **Mike officially filed for the 2022 ballot!** We know Mike is the leader Texas deserves to tackle the real challenges facing our state. Right now our campaign is coming up on a major fundraising deadline. At the end of the year, we’ll have to publicly report our fundraising numbers to the Texas Ethics Commission. All eyes will be on the numbers we report to see how strong (or vulnerable) our grassroots campaign is — which is why Mike is counting on you to come through: [**Help us prove to Texas and the rest of the country that we have what it takes to defeat Dan Patrick. Chip in $5 (or more!) towards our $10,000 goal before the deadline expires at midnight and show Mike you have his back >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39604324/320583911/1189302780?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=AU_MC_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20211212_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTc3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzdiNTg2ZC03ZTViLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s9hfMld9MaThG3Qri9WLanW_a6fY-bG2lNS-jiOyC24=) | [CHIP IN](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39604325/320583913/1189302780?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=AU_MC_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20211212_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTc3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzdiNTg2ZC03ZTViLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s9hfMld9MaThG3Qri9WLanW_a6fY-bG2lNS-jiOyC24=)

_\----- Original Message from Ali S Zaidi, Team Collier December 11, 2021 -----_
Huge news, team:
**Today, Mike officially filed to run for Lieutenant Governor of Texas.** We want to be clear: we couldn't have gotten here without you.
We don't have much time left to make sure Mike is the candidate who goes up against Dan Patrick next November. Early voting in the primary starts on February 14 __ — just over two months from now! It's crunch time, and we need your help more than ever to keep building the campaign that's going to win for the people of Texas.
With no time to waste, our grassroots campaign needs to raise $10,000 by the end of this weekend to ensure we have the resources to go all the way. [**Will you pitch in whatever you can now to help us get there?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39604326/320583915/1189302780?refcode=AU_MC_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20211212_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTc3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzdiNTg2ZC03ZTViLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s9hfMld9MaThG3Qri9WLanW_a6fY-bG2lNS-jiOyC24=)
Y’all, we’re not being hyperbolic when we say that Dan Patrick is one of _the most vulnerable_ lieutenant governors in the country.
Texans are furious at everything that keeps happening under Dan Patrick’s failed leadership. Blackouts with no water. Thousands of unnecessary deaths. Repeated attacks on our fundamental rights. Like Mike always says, the only way to hold our so-called leaders accountable is to run against them — and to beat them.
As a career-long auditor, energy expert, and financial watchdog, Mike is eager to deliver solutions for the people of Texas — not create more problems. And he’s ready to win and change the way our state does business.
But in order to take on Dan Patrick directly, Mike has to be able to travel to hear from voters, spread his message everywhere across the state, from the Panhandle down to the Rio Grande Valley, and keep building our grassroots organization from the ground up. All that work takes resources, and we're running out of time.
[**So please pitch in $3 or whatever you can today to help us hit our 24-hour, $10,000 goal so we can start our first day as an official (!) campaign for Lieutenant Governor strong and keep building the momentum we need to beat Dan Patrick:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39604327/320583916/1189302780?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=AU_MC_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20211212_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTc3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzdiNTg2ZC03ZTViLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s9hfMld9MaThG3Qri9WLanW_a6fY-bG2lNS-jiOyC24=)

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Victor Davis Hanson on DVD
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.
_Sponsored message_
This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2za49qpu6l6g9le4n07cup5d6prsh2cqf4l56dgr0_rp22sh2s8i66pj4spj6aor2cjh2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zkgu8ei9jq9bh8qrf9u1nnvli642d1bdaoqtfhng_rp22sh2s8i66pj4spj6aor2cjh2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zf7fuclqtmod72100kut4mph9b671jjbg63nbs0g_rp22sh2s8i66pj4spj6aor2cjh2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---
Trump Train News

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[Click here to unsubscribe](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zm24gu1khhg1hmqu1bmb43v8g10496bplk06632o_)

# Weekly Newsletter
---
|
---
December 12, 2021 | Issue 1
---
| |
---
| | Leader Rob Ortt On Governor Hochul's Statewide Mask Mandate
The half-baked announcement from Governor Hochul is a complete reversal from her previous comments, and she is now attempting to mandate that local governments and businesses do the impossible.
Like her predecessor, I believe the Governor has overstepped her authority with this order. I am reviewing options with my colleagues to rescind this authority and restore these public health decisions to local communities, where they belong.
---
| |
---
| |
---
### Calling on changes to New York's bail laws
---
This week, Senate Republican Leader Rob Ortt & Addiction Advocate Avi Israel called for changes to NY bail laws to assist those struggling with addiction.
---
| [READ THE STATEMENT](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017pAb_PpC2Q9LaJ3WcV7tL_xejlEsbeDgCW3KHlCqHC_IvBwHlP9j5ntHwGLjuoa0xJHbtvrEzenanMMczee-BKhhZpmI849TlsLkGIqQ7fRE2Jeg9Twk66Mjzr8gAoxGygAyhcxZiPgNZywlV3wkIE8Da2M57jY-gbNmigETTgYfMzTPS8E1u86eeaHWgvaqB83PC8Mi4V0i4BrBbWWEc2xzNmZepcjKMzGHL3OR0PI=&c=hPzo-oyVFzFW17su0RPdriIhnEZWGmicwmrEV-CqOu0J1EKTdyDU6A==&ch=wKsBAuel-_X3oku1PA68eyNvXTblpf4t1MSRyc-iPepu_rrcdimF1g==)
---
---
|
---
---
### Bail reform laws have only hurt those suffering from drug addiction
---
---
---
Leader Rob Ortt, Senator Fred Akshar, Assemblyman Joe Angelino, and Binghamton Mayor Rich David held a press conference this week to discuss the sad reality that New York's bail reform laws have made the opioid epidemic worse.
"Sending people out on the streets to continue to use heroin isn't justice. We have a responsibility to act, regardless of politics, to help struggling New Yorkers and make our communities safer," said Leader Ortt.
---
|
---
---
### The Navy Club of Lockport Pearl Harbor's 80th Anniversary Memorial
---
Tuesday was the 80th year anniversary of the attack on Pearl Harbor. Leader Ortt attended the annual Wreath Laying Ceremony put on by the Navy Club of Lockport to honor the lives lost in service to our Country.
"The efforts of the Navy Club of Lockport and other groups alike will ensure that we never forget those who lost their lives protecting our freedoms."
---
---
|
---
Senator Spotlight
---
---
Senator Tom O'Mara represents New York's 58th Senate District and recently published an Op-Ed in The Chronicle-Express advocating for New York farmers. A decision by the Farm Wage Board to reduce the overtime threshold for farm workers from 60 hours to 40 hours would be detrimental to the agricultural industry.
"It is critical for upstate legislators, for whom the farm economy is a foundation of communities we represent, to continue sounding the alarm on a Wage Board still holding the future of so many farmers and rural economies in its hands. Many of us, on a bipartisan basis by the way, are doing just that. This is the worst possible time to risk mandating and regulating more farms out of business."
---

### Non-Citizen Voting Is Wrong for NYC (and Everywhere Else)
---
By Rob Ortt | Published in the National Review
---
The 2021 elections were nothing short of a disaster for the far-left Democrats across our country. The results were no different here in New York, as Democratic candidates for District Attorney were soundly defeated by Republicans on bellwether Long Island. All across our state, Republicans gained ground, even picking up Council seats in deep blue New York City.
Simultaneously, three Democrat-sponsored statewide constitutional amendments, all initially assumed to be shoo-ins to pass, instead failed as voters wisely and correctly recognized them as hyper-partisan power grabs poorly disguised as reforms.
How have Democrats responded to these abysmal November results? By not changing a thing.
Democrats continue to dismiss the public good and try to angle instead for what benefits them. The latest is in New York City, where Councilman Ydanis Rodriguez has put forth a proposal that would allow non-citizens to vote in elections under the guise of "municipal voters."
This bill would give close to one million citizens of foreign countries the right to vote as if they are citizens here. It's such a blatantly and boldly unconstitutional proposal that even leftist Mayor Bill de Blasio has [questioned its legality](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017pAb_PpC2Q9LaJ3WcV7tL_xejlEsbeDgCW3KHlCqHC_IvBwHlP9j5ntHwGLjuoa07hfIJzl_K28ShLIFFi9isptk9ElMW5JHz7BVnXhzOXkmqSl3ITUybEButJI5Nvb1sKSgmRgnaYKR4HV3CuIni8FYKBhN2PBNbC9pYw4OkvpwB_bNR-PrijJUGZO3KfE81Vpz72PJxYrPIVojRTOA9rBQfCIdkk_okPagGBT-MNDHivOi87qDOYmpT54d_Zfqp7GYXc4YN6qs7hj_dp0m7Ci5_qZdRSeTZYrdNyUlnvdvOgIaCLs7hw==&c=hPzo-oyVFzFW17su0RPdriIhnEZWGmicwmrEV-CqOu0J1EKTdyDU6A==&ch=wKsBAuel-_X3oku1PA68eyNvXTblpf4t1MSRyc-iPepu_rrcdimF1g==).
If enacted, this proposal would undermine the fragile security of our electoral system and devalue the votes cast by legally and legitimately registered voters. This bill is also downright disrespectful to immigrants who rightly follow the legal process and work hard - sometimes for years - to become American citizens.
Even if civic responsibilities mean nothing to Councilman Rodriguez and his far-left allies, they mean a great deal to immigrants who become naturalized American citizens, raise their right hand, and swear an oath of allegiance to the United States of America and the values of this great nation. They earn and cherish the right to vote, which is a sacred part of being an American citizen.
This is only just the latest example of the far-left Democrats trying to change the rules in order to stack the odds in their favor at the ballot box. This proposal, like the recently-failed statewide constitutional amendments, is part of a long pattern of Democrats trying to ram through policies thinly disguised as reforms but actually designed to decimate their political opponents. It's not about doing the right thing; it's about consolidating their own power.
---

name: Abby Finkenauer
subject: Trump's comeback tour started in Iowa
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
| | |
---
**It happened, Peter: Donald Trump came back to Iowa and endorsed my opponent, Sen. Chuck Grassley. This is an urgent update for our campaign and for our country. I hope you'll allow me a minute to explain why.**
I served in Congress when Trump was president. I had an up-close seat as he obstructed justice and spouted his dangerous and increasingly anti-democratic ideologies. We've seen how much progress our country has made in the time since voters sent him and Republicans packing in the 2020 election. With Democratic majorities, our country has finally been able to move forward.
But now, Donald Trump has kicked off his comeback tour in Iowa – and we know exactly what his game plan is. **Step one: Protect vulnerable incumbents like my opponent, Sen. Grassley (R-IA), and dismantle Democratic majorities. Step two: Take back the White House.**
I'm not going to sugarcoat things: Trump's return to our state is incredibly dangerous. He will do everything he can to return Senate control to Republican hands and protect his ally, Sen. Grassley – who recently defended Trump's attempts to use the Department of Justice to overturn the 2020 election results.
It's up to grassroots teams like ours to ensure that Trump and the Republicans don't regain control of the Senate – and with Sen. Grassley facing his lowest approval ratings in nearly two decades, we have a chance to flip this seat blue. But we need grassroots resources to do it. **That's why we've set a fundraising goal of $10,000 before midnight tonight. Please, can you donate now to counter Trump and protect our Democratic majority?**

subject: ** A side-by-side look **

We're so excited to see your responses. Thank you! Team Tina Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek P.O. Box 42307 Portland, OR 97242 This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. You can .

name: Team Schrier
subject: Six years ago today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
Six years ago today, the Paris Climate agreement was adopted when nearly 200 nations pledged to do their part to combat climate change and work to limit global warming to less than 2 degrees celsius. But in 2019, Donald Trump broke our commitment by pulling out of this agreement. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39605608/320594262/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlODU0ZmU3ZS04ZTViLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cBpYGFjWkT_JmQ3nPXxBSok4rgC-ked5LSzlk8s3qlE=&emci=d862ce0a-cf59-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=e854fe7e-8e5b-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=15820338)
---
Peter,

Six years ago today, the Paris Climate agreement was adopted when nearly 200 nations pledged to do their part to combat climate change and work to limit global warming to less than 2 degrees celsius. But in 2019, Donald Trump broke our commitment by pulling out of this agreement.

We only have a few years to make major changes before we see irreversible and profound damage to our environment, and Trump's actions set us back in our crucial efforts to combat climate change. Fortunately, President Biden rejoined the Paris Climate Agreement on his first day in office, and he's signed a series of executive orders aimed at confronting climate change -- but we need to do more.

**As a doctor, scientist, and former EPA employee, Kim understands that we need to take serious action now to combat climate change, and she's working in Congress to protect our planet for future generations.**

That's why Kim was proud to help pass the Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act last month. This legislation includes provisions championed by Kim to make our forests healthier and more resilient to wildfires, protect our rivers and streams, and more.

But we can't stop there. Kim also helped pass the Build Back Better Act, which represents the largest-ever single investment in our clean energy economy and sets us on course for a 50% reduction in greenhouse gas emissions by 2030. Now, we need the Senate to act and pass this historic legislation.

**[Climate change is the moral issue of our time. clean_body: Six years ago today, the Paris Climate agreement was adopted when nearly 200 nations pledged to do their part to combat climate change and work to limit global warming to less than 2 degrees celsius. But in 2019, Donald Trump broke our commitment by pulling out of this agreement. Peter, Six years ago today, the Paris Climate agreement was adopted when nearly 200 nations pledged to do their part to combat climate change and work to limit global warming to less than 2 degrees celsius. But in 2019, Donald Trump broke our commitment by pulling out of this agreement. We only have a few years to make major changes before we see irreversible and profound damage to our environment, and Trump's actions set us back in our crucial efforts to combat climate change. Fortunately, President Biden rejoined the Paris Climate Agreement on his first day in office, and he's signed a series of executive orders aimed at confronting climate change -- but we need to do more. As a doctor, scientist, and former EPA employee, Kim understands that we need to take serious action now to combat climate change, and she's working in Congress to protect our planet for future generations. That's why Kim was proud to help pass the Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act last month. This legislation includes provisions championed by Kim to make our forests healthier and more resilient to wildfires, protect our rivers and streams, and more. But we can't stop there. Kim also helped pass the Build Back Better Act, which represents the largest-ever single investment in our clean energy economy and sets us on course for a 50% reduction in greenhouse gas emissions by 2030. Now, we need the Senate to act and pass this historic legislation. | Thanks, Team Schrier National Republicans have named Rep. Kim Schrier's district a top target for the midterms, so we need your help to build another winning campaign. Will you chip in to protect Kim's seat and the Democratic House majority in 2022? = Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress Contributions or gifts to Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress are not tax deductible. name: Andy Beshear
subject: Team Western Kentucky Tornado Relief Fund
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
This weekend, our state experienced the most severe tornado event in its history. As I visited communities impacted by this weather, I was absolutely heartbroken by the destruction. Peter,

This weekend, our state experienced the most severe tornado event in its history. As I visited communities impacted by this weather, I was absolutely heartbroken by the destruction.

My thoughts are with every Kentuckian impacted by this storm. Know that the entire Commonwealth is standing with you -- you have our support and you have our prayers.

I also want to personally thank every local EMS employee, police officer, firefighter and first responder who have worked to keep as many Kentuckians safe as possible.

Kentuckians are strong, but they need our support and I'm committed to getting them the resources they need to recover. That's why I've formed the Team Western Kentucky Tornado Relief Fund to assist those impacted by the tornados and the severe weather system.

**[If you would like to help our families with relief and recovery, please donate to the Western Kentucky Tornado Relief Fund. Every dollar will make a difference.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39606124/320597091/23514870?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzYwMmQ3Ny05NTViLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oYipj7S2tfLW_W2IGli5MuPM8KCgokLfZauT7M11QlY=&emci=e25c02e1-685b-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=27602d77-955b-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=1437603)**

We're in this together,

Andy

clean_body: This weekend, our state experienced the most severe tornado event in its history. As I visited communities impacted by this weather, I was absolutely heartbroken by the destruction. Peter, This weekend, our state experienced the most severe tornado event in its history. As I visited communities impacted by this weather, I was absolutely heartbroken by the destruction. My thoughts are with every Kentuckian impacted by this storm. Know that the entire Commonwealth is standing with you -- you have our support and you have our prayers. I also want to personally thank every local EMS employee, police officer, firefighter and first responder who have worked to keep as many Kentuckians safe as possible. Kentuckians are strong, but they need our support and I'm committed to getting them the resources they need to recover. That's why I've formed the Team Western Kentucky Tornado Relief Fund to assist those impacted by the tornados and the severe weather system. We're in this together, Andy | PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR Andy Beshear for Governor PO Box 4278 Louisville, KY 40204 United States

Can you read this really quick, Folks? **New Hampshire was the closest Senate race in the country in 2016.** Maggie won her race, beating a far-right GOP incumbent and flipping this seat by 1,017 votes -- less than half a point. In campaigns, we call that a field margin, where the winner of a close race depends on getting on the ground early and talking to every voter we can. In 2022, all eyes will be on New Hampshire. With the Senate majority riding on this seat and Mitch McConnell already spending BIG to try to flip the majority, we’re in for another close race. name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Tell Nancy Pelosi: Take action against Boebert’s bigotry
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Nancy Pelosi hasn’t done anything to condemn the hateful rhetoric of
conspiracy-theorist Lauren Boebert, who called Ilhan Omar evil and
“black-hearted,” and went on to imply that Ilhan was a terrorist.

Since Boebert was elected, she has targeted the Squad with violent
rhetoric, spread hateful lies, and often refers to four progressive women
of color as “the jihad squad.”

Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez has called Nancy Pelosi’s inaction towards
Boebert “an embarrassment” — and we agree. Nancy Pelosi must take
immediate action to stop these hateful attacks.

Justice Democrats Cori Bush and Ayanna Pressley introduced a resolution to
remove Lauren Boebert from her committee assignments. When you make a
contribution, you are sending a message to Nancy Pelosi that Lauren
Boebert’s anti-muslim bigotry is unacceptable. [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/86565?refcode=em20211212-20941&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=20941%2E1203867%2EDDPeHT ]Will you make a
$3 contribution to stand with the Squad and show your
support?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/86565?refcode=em20211212-20941&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=20941%2E1203867%2EDDPeHT ]Fight Back

Ilhan, AOC, Ayanna, and Cori don’t want to engage with Lauren Boebert. But
we can’t let this racist, anti-Muslim rhetoric go unchecked. Nancy Pelosi
has a duty to stand up to Lauren Boebert to show solidarity with
Muslim-Americans and to protect her fellow caucus members. Her inaction
isn’t just embarrassing — it is unacceptable.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/86565?refcode=em20211212-20941&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=20941%2E1203867%2EDDPeHT ]When you make a contribution to Justice Democrats, you are building
the political power necessary to elect leaders who will always stand up
against islamophobia, xenophobia, and anti-Blackness. Will you stand with
the Squad and make a contribution right now?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/86565?refcode=em20211212-20941&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=20941%2E1203867%2EDDPeHT ]Fight Back

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1024&akid=20941%2E1203867%2EDDPeHT ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1025&akid=20941%2E1203867%2EDDPeHT ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20211212-20941-footer&t=1026&refcode2=20941_1203867_DDPeHT&akid=20941%2E1203867%2EDDPeHT

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. | | Derek, In just a moment, I am going to ask you to make a contribution to my re-election campaign. Please give me a chance to explain why this request — especially today — is so important.

Here is the truth:

Tonight at midnight we close the books on our mid-month fundraising drive.

This one is important, because historically December is a tough month for fundraising. Especially in the second half of the month when people understandably tune out politics.

But that means we really need a strong first half of the month to hit our goals. Because while a lot of our supporters may be tuned out, those spending big to beat us are not. They see this as an opportunity.

So we still need about 5,000 donations TODAY to reach our goals. And there’s only one way that happens: together.

[**Please make a $27 contribution split between my re-election campaign and CommonGood before midnight. It all adds up when everyone is chipping in.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39606285/320598168/-368617150?refcode=20211212_CGVA_Kelly&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDFhN2YwYS05NjViLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rFIvhRA4WmMyppLt6A41HoQvAhgQQ0Kc_6CysJFnnrs=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39606286/320598175/-368617150?refcode=20211212_CGVA_Kelly&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDFhN2YwYS05NjViLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rFIvhRA4WmMyppLt6A41HoQvAhgQQ0Kc_6CysJFnnrs=) | | | [DONATE $25 ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39606287/320598182/-368617150?refcode=20211212_CGVA_Kelly&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDFhN2YwYS05NjViLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rFIvhRA4WmMyppLt6A41HoQvAhgQQ0Kc_6CysJFnnrs=)

clean_body: Tonight at midnight we close the books on our mid-month fundraising drive. | | | = | | Derek, In just a moment, I am going to ask you to make a contribution to my re-election campaign. Please give me a chance to explain why this request — especially today — is so important. Here is the truth: Tonight at midnight we close the books on our mid-month fundraising drive. This one is important, because historically December is a tough month for fundraising. Especially in the second half of the month when people understandably tune out politics. But that means we really need a strong first half of the month to hit our goals. Because while a lot of our supporters may be tuned out, those spending big to beat us are not. They see this as an opportunity. So we still need about 5,000 donations TODAY to reach our goals. And there’s only one way that happens: together. = = | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you in advance for chipping in, Mark Common Good Virginia PO Box 26112 Arlington, VA 22215 If you would like to opt-out of future emails from Common Good Virginia, click. Paid for by Common Good Virginia

body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58991477:6PZ2fkENC:m:1:3253819041:0C7B5492382AD29972B7770ED4A21145:r "Headline") Peter: Liberals in Congress passed a bloated and ridiculous "infrastructure" bill, earmarking $1.2 trillion of your money for their pet projects. Unfortunately, for AOC, the bill didn't go far enough, and she is heartbroken. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58991477:6PZ2fkENC:m:1:3253819041:0C7B5492382AD29972B7770ED4A21145:r "AOC")I voted against this bill because it is terrible for the American people. **I want to SAVE America from Joe Biden 's out-of-control spending, and for that, I am called a monster.** But when AOC voted against this bill because it only spends $1.2 Trillion of your money on liberal policies, she is applauded as a "hero." After all, the bill failed to account for her "Green New Deal" and fell shy of hobbling the American economy beyond repair. For those acts, she is applauded for her courage. **_Do you see the difference?_** I spend every day in Congress standing up to AOC while the media lifts cheers on her insults to America. **[But I need to know if you support my efforts and want to keep AOC unhappy. If so, will you join my team with $25, $50, or $100 and help put an end to the socialist spending coming from Washington?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58991478:6PZ2fkENC:m:1:3253819041:0C7B5492382AD29972B7770ED4A21145:r "But I need to know if you support my efforts
and want to keep AOC unhappy. If so, will you join my team with $25, $50, or $100 and help put an end to the socialist spending coming from
Washington?")** **_If it were up to me, AOC would always be unhappy._** **_AOC is happy_** when your child is being forced to learn Critical Race Theory, and parents are labeled "domestic terrorists" by the FBI if they object. **_AOC is happy_** when your 15-year-old daughter is told she doesn't need your permission to get an abortion. **_AOC is happy_** when her policies send our nation into bankruptcy. **When she is _unhappy_ , it is good for America.** Sadly, she is very popular here in Congress, and my struggle against her has only increased the attacks against me from her friends in the media and the other radical progressives in Congress. However, **[I believe defeating socialism is my calling, and I will continue to take a stand against it if you show your support with an IMMEDIATE donation of $1,000, $500, $250, $100, or just $45.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58991479:6PZ2fkENC:m:1:3253819041:0C7B5492382AD29972B7770ED4A21145:r "I believe defeating socialism is my
calling, and I will continue to take a stand against it if you show your support with an IMMEDIATE donation of $1,000, $500, $250, $100, or just $45.")** Once again, freedom-loving Americans have to stand up to a media darling with bad ideas. I am not afraid of hurting her feelings; I am more concerned with saving our nation. **[Again, when AOC is unhappy, it is good for America! If you agree, I hope you'll support my efforts with $50, $100, or even $500 TODAY!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58991480:6PZ2fkENC:m:1:3253819041:0C7B5492382AD29972B7770ED4A21145:r "Again, when AOC is unhappy, it is good for America! If you
agree, I hope you’ll support my efforts with $50, $100, or even $500 TODAY!")** Thank you. God Bless America. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58991477:6PZ2fkENC:m:1:3253819041:0C7B5492382AD29972B7770ED4A21145:r "Marjorie Taylor Greene")
Marjorie Taylor Greene
Congresswoman (R-GA) P.S. AOC and the mean girls in her Jihad Squad can say all the mean things they want. I'm not in high school anymore, and I won't stop fighting to keep Americans free from their socialist agenda. **[Not when I have patriots like you on my team who will donate $50, $100, or even $1,000 to help me keep AOC unhappy.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58991481:6PZ2fkENC:m:1:3253819041:0C7B5492382AD29972B7770ED4A21145:r "Not when I have patriots like you on my team who will donate
$50, $100, or even $1,000 to help me keep AOC unhappy.")** Thank you.

name: Great America Update
subject: Is socialism on the rise?
body:
Socialism appears to be on the rise in our country, especially among the young, and we want to understand the extent of that support. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6675%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=KTXLCF3S6B16VuSEg7vV5w&sysid=1)
| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68745%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=QBVhOfObGUIKkAP3RF5MSA&sysid=1)
---
| | | Dear Fellow American, Socialism appears to be on the rise in our country, especially among the young, and we want to understand the extent of that support. That’s why you have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a National Survey on Socialism. With your response, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans--views that we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. Every month, Hillsdale College is reaching millions of Americans with educational outreach. Your response to this National Survey on Socialism is essential in helping us form the most effective strategy in fighting for the future of our country. So please give your views on the political, media, and cultural forces that are promoting socialism in our country today, by completing this National Survey on Socialism: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2021-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68746%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=hL%2fIIBHFujYlhlSGd%2bL3Uw&sysid=1)** There is no doubt in my mind that, especially among younger Americans, socialism is increasingly attractive--and that this threatens the future of American liberty. As Winston Churchill noted, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” And education is the surest way to defeat it. If you agree, please stand with Hillsdale College as we promote intelligent patriotism and defend liberty through education. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Socialism today. | [**Take the Survey**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68747%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Rf%2bKH8sfkZ9URyDCOiXSeA&sysid=1)
---

Warm Regards,
Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

name: Self Reliance Central
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation
This sponsored message from Self Reliance Central is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zb14hfsfcomf6hnbmu870nbn1t414kf962f5lgu0_rp22sh2s8i66pj4spgm1oj4cjh2bs) Dear Fellow American,
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.
A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.
That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.**
By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.
You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below:
**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zgm87sk4j34rjgdoioqsoct0m41rcueput35lp78_rp22sh2s8i66pj4spgm1oj4cjh2bs)**
For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.
**But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.**
This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.
Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states.
These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale's Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College.
**And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.**
So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.
**You can take the survey using this secure link I 've provided below:**
**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zhd711o5gk05of1btg5u2l2pm4lstjtshjle6cn0_rp22sh2s8i66pj4spgm1oj4cjh2bs)**
And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.
Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.
Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Great America Update
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6676%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=uR%2bstl8YLFXIXVCtY6kvxA&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68740%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=R7%2f4t25OcMvMLnJpJx0BMA&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68741%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=vRhDwCtSj0MUVVwuRjpV5A&sysid=1) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68742%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3OBjBzawyVfj7yhyL2heUA&sysid=1)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_

That’s why we’re setting a goal to generate $5,000 in monthly recurring donations to our campaign before the end of the year. This looks like: 25 of our strongest supporters pitching in $200 a month 50 of our supporters pitching in $100 a month 100 of our supporters pitching in $50 a month 250 of our supporters pitching in $20 a month It’s going to take all of us working together to defeat the GOP’s corporate fundraising machine, but we know we can do this. = = = = = Together, we have what it takes to defeat Ron Johnson. Thanks for helping us make history, Team Battino It’s time for a new kind of leadership in Wisconsin. Gillian built her career on integrity, advocacy, and action, and she’s ready to put that skill set to work in the U.S. Senate! It's going to take all of us working together to defeat Ron Johnson to get her there, but if you'd like to receive fewer emails, we understand. You can request to get only the most important emails , or you can . = Dr. Gillian Battino has dedicated her life’s work to bettering the world and continues that commitment every day. Gillian spent 20+ years serving the people of Wisconsin and helping women in the fight against breast cancer. She has seen, up close and personal, the difference that access to quality health care can make. =** Gillian Battino for U.S. Senate P.O. Box 292 Wausau, WI 54402-0292 United States Paid for by Battino for U.S. Senate

The problem is, he is up against deep pockets and dark money interests. He needs all the support he can get to gear up for the 2022 election, including your vote of confidence now.

disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
| | | [](https://links.e.dccc.)
**[I hate to alarm you, but Donald Trump's PAC has officially hired Iowa staff, which sources are calling his first big move to run for President. I'm calling for a swift and POWERFUL response -- 3,000 gifts before midnight -- to PROTECT our Democratic House Majority and stop this one-term President from EVER setting foot in our White House again. >>](https://links.e.dccc.)**
Please listen closely:

\-- Trump hinted he'll run for **PRESIDENT** if Republicans flip the House
\-- Republicans only need to unseat **FIVE** Democrats to do it
\-- Trump's so confident in their chances, he's making moves in Iowa.

Let me be clear: Trump is relying on Republicans taking our Majority to launch his Presidential campaign.

I need your help to ensure he never gets the chance.

**[That's why I'm calling for 3,000 gifts before midnight to protect our Majority and shut down the GOP's plans to regain power. I can't overstate how grateful I'd be for your immediate $3 right now >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/z7-)**

**_Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz:_**

I'm so thankful for your support.

With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward.

But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. |
---
Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right.

https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/December-Survey
#

Hi there,
We know it’s a Sunday, so we won’t take up too much of your time.
But before you go enjoy the rest of your day, [**we hope you’ll take a minute to fill out our official December Supporter Survey. Here’s the first (and ONLY) question — It’s quick, easy, and will make a big difference to our campaign.**](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/December-Issue-Survey?source=em211212-1-30&refcode2=499.159979.nanoVC&t=1&akid=499%2E159979%2EnanoVC)

Grassroots supporters like you are the heart of this campaign. And mobilizing grassroots supporters is going to be key to our success in 2022. So we want to make sure we’re talking about the issues that matter to you. And the best way to do that is to hear directly from you.
We’re running a 100% people-powered campaign. But that means we rely heavily on feedback from grassroots supporters like you, so your responses today make a big difference to our campaign.
**Please, use this link to fill out our December Issues Survey and let Alex know where you stand. We’ll be going over the results Monday morning, so please get your response in today:**
[**https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/December-Survey**](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/December-Issue-Survey?source=em211212-1-30&refcode2=499.159979.nanoVC&t=4&akid=499%2E159979%2EnanoVC)

Team Padilla

name: Team Fetterman
subject: fwd: Bad news re: Dr. Oz
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Dr. Oz just ramped up his self-funded ad buy to $2 million. We need to fight back.
#
Breaking news, Derek — Dr. Oz just increased his already massive self-funded TV ad buy to $2 MILLION. 🤯
John said it best when we announced Dr. Oz’s initial (still self-funded) $1.2 million ad buy:
**This is a pivotal moment for our campaign, Derek. I *truly* believe that how we respond to this could make or break us.**
And with the news that Dr. Oz is funneling even more of his own money in to try and buy Pennsylvania’s U.S. Senate seat, this couldn’t be more true.
**[So, Derek, can you make a donation of $5-- or whatever you can afford -- to our campaign to send John to the U.S. Senate and protect our Democratic majority? We need all hands on deck if we’re going to stop Dr. Oz’s self-funded ads from drowning out our people-powered progressive vision.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/38192?refcode=em20211212-3806&amount=5&t=1&akid=3806%2E434096%2EK-qjSS)**
**[Fight Back: Donate $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/38192?refcode=em20211212-3806&amount=5&t=20&akid=3806%2E434096%2EK-qjSS)**
Let’s blow Dr. Oz out of the water with our grassroots power. 💪
Thanks, Derek.
--Team Fetterman
_\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: John Fetterman
Date: Fri, Dec. 3, 2021
Subject: Bad news re: Dr. Oz
To: Derek [dpwillis67@gmail.com]_
Derek,
Not even two days after launching his campaign, Dr. Oz just booked $1.2 million (at least) in TV ads to try to buy this Senate seat. With a reported net worth of $100 million, Oz can spend virtually unlimited sums to keep Pennsylvania Red. 🔴
**This is a pivotal moment for our campaign, Derek. I *truly* believe that how we respond to this could make or break us.** We’ve got two options:
1. We either stand by while this celeb pseudoscientist buys his way into the U.S. Senate — where he’ll have an even _bigger_ stage to push right-wing policies and COVID conspiracies.

**\- OR -**

2. We raise up a grassroots army so freaking big that we can match him dollar-for-dollar, flip PA blue, and send a true Pennsylvania fighter for working people to the Senate.

[**_What do you say, Derek? Can I get you to donate $5 now to help us fight back against this $1.2 million TV ad onslaught from Dr. Oz? Every bit helps._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/38192?refcode=em20211212-3806&amount=5&t=21&akid=3806%2E434096%2EK-qjSS)
**[Fight Back: Donate $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/38192?refcode=em20211212-3806&amount=5&t=40&akid=3806%2E434096%2EK-qjSS)**
The biggest mistake we could make right now is underestimating Dr. Oz.
Yes, he’s a celebrity doctor.
Yes, he’s spent the last decade profiting off of provably false obscure medical theories and conspiracies.
Yeah, his home isn’t even in Pennsylvania ... it’s in New Jersey.
**But, we know another rich celebrity that the politicians and pundits underestimated.** His name is Donald Trump and he won Pennsylvania in 2016.
With enough money and fame to buy his way to the top, Dr. Oz is a serious threat to win not only the Republican nomination, but the whole damn thing.
**The good news is we have been preparing for this very moment.** We have — by far — the biggest grassroots campaign in the state. And if we all come together right now, we can out-fundraise, out-organize, and out-campaign Dr. Oz just by the sheer force of our numbers. That’s why I’m asking you right now...
[**_Please make a $5 donation to help us fight Dr. Oz’s six-figure TV ad onslaught. Whether you can give $5 or $50 or $500, it doesn’t matter. What’s important is that we all do it together._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/38192?refcode=em20211212-3806&amount=5&t=41&akid=3806%2E434096%2EK-qjSS)
Oz is a big threat. But he’s no match for our movement. 💪💪💪
Let’s win this thing,
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20211212-3806-footer&t=42&refcode2=3806_434096_K-qjSS&akid=3806%2E434096%2EK-qjSS)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=43&akid=3806%2E434096%2EK-qjSS)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=44&akid=3806%2E434096%2EK-qjSS)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

Hello,
This month, our country yet again faced the grim reality that has become commonplace in America: Another school shooting; another community devastated by gun violence; another day of wondering about America’s fascination with firearms and whispering “thoughts and prayers.”
Most Republicans want us to believe that the answer to stopping gun violence in this country is _more_ firearms. Everyone knows that’s not true, but the Republican blinders are on because the NRA is paying them handsomely.
**And just days after 4 more teenagers were killed in Oxford, Michigan, my opponent Chuck Grassley went on the Senate floor and BLOCKED a bill requiring universal background checks for gun purchases. You couldn’t make this up.**
I’m running for Senate against Chuck Grassley because I’m done with Republicans kowtowing to the NRA and caring more about their campaign donations than the lives of our children.
[**If you’re ready to elect a Democrat who will take on the NRA – not take their blood money – then chip in $5 or whatever you can afford right now to my campaign. With your help now, we can defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic Senate majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39607565/320604582/-42398318?refcode=em20211212pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNTc1YzNhMC1hNzViLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8joXjZCSsKZKqRQbXXpVd7Ye6aQDky8UXhYw4gaMEHc=)

body:
| | |
---

name: Daniel Wasta
subject: Abby is the senator that Iowa deserves
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
| | |
---
Hey, Peter, it's Daniel (Abby's husband). First, I wanted to say thank you for being a part of this team. We're building a true grassroots movement, and I really appreciate you being a part of it. Second, I wanted to provide a few important updates ahead of Abby's most important fundraising deadline ever: this year's final, and public, FEC report.
Let's back up a bit and talk about Abby's opponent: Sen. Grassley (R-IA). He's spent his seven terms in office advancing far-right ideologies and sabotaging efforts to help working families. We didn't think it could get much worse, but then he defended Donald Trump's dangerous conspiracy theories and attempts to overturn last year's election. _Then, _he stood on stage with Trump at a rally here in Iowa and wholeheartedly accepted his endorsement.
Honestly, as an Iowan and an American, it's been scary to watch.
I know I'm biased, but Abby is the exact opposite of Sen. Grassley and she is exactly the sort of person we need in the Senate. Seeing Abby fight for her community every single day gives me hope. She's everything that a leader should be: caring, passionate, hard-working, determined and ready to sit down and talk with anyone, regardless of their party. **She's the senator our state deserves and the one that it desperately needs.**
That brings me back to the FEC deadline Abby's up against. It's both an opportunity and a challenge: an opportunity to publicly – to the pundits, the media and Sen. Grassley himself – show the strength of this campaign. It's also a challenge to raise what we need to compete, particularly with the Senate Republican campaign arm sitting on nearly $30 million in the bank to attack competitive challengers like Abby.
**Right now, here's what it's going to take to keep pace and blow our last FEC fundraising goal out of the water: raising another $25,000 before midnight tonight. I get we're asking for a massive surge in grassroots support, but frankly, it's what it will take to compete and win this race.**

clean_body: | | | Hey, Peter, it's Daniel (Abby's husband). First, I wanted to say thank you for being a part of this team. We're building a true grassroots movement, and I really appreciate you being a part of it. Second, I wanted to provide a few important updates ahead of Abby's most important fundraising deadline ever: this year's final, and public, FEC report. Let's back up a bit and talk about Abby's opponent: Sen. Grassley (R-IA). He's spent his seven terms in office advancing far-right ideologies and sabotaging efforts to help working families. We didn't think it could get much worse, but then he defended Donald Trump's dangerous conspiracy theories and attempts to overturn last year's election. Then, he stood on stage with Trump at a rally here in Iowa and wholeheartedly accepted his endorsement. Honestly, as an Iowan and an American, it's been scary to watch. I know I'm biased, but Abby is the exact opposite of Sen. Grassley and she is exactly the sort of person we need in the Senate. Seeing Abby fight for her community every single day gives me hope. She's everything that a leader should be: caring, passionate, hard-working, determined and ready to sit down and talk with anyone, regardless of their party. She's the senator our state deserves and the one that it desperately needs. That brings me back to the FEC deadline Abby's up against. It's both an opportunity and a challenge: an opportunity to publicly – to the pundits, the media and Sen. Grassley himself – show the strength of this campaign. It's also a challenge to raise what we need to compete, particularly with the Senate Republican campaign arm sitting on nearly $30 million in the bank to attack competitive challengers like Abby. Right now, here's what it's going to take to keep pace and blow our last FEC fundraising goal out of the water: raising another $25,000 before midnight tonight. I get we're asking for a massive surge in grassroots support, but frankly, it's what it will take to compete and win this race. So please, Peter:= If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thanks for all that you do. It means so much to Abby and me. – Daniel | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. To receive fewer emails, please click #!. To unsubscribe from this email list, please click . Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa PO Box 1843 Cedar Rapids, IA 52406 United States |

clean_body: Last week, Marcus Flowers joined Lincoln Project’s “The Breakdown” to share why decided to run for Congress against Marjorie Taylor Greene in 2022. = Last week, Marcus Flowers joined Lincoln Project’s “The Breakdown” to share why he decided to run for Congress against Marjorie Taylor Greene in 2022. He talked about how he was moved by watching the murder of George Floyd, the disparaging remarks made by Marjorie Taylor Greene against Black and Brown people, and seeing police officers beaten by an American flag at the U.S. Capitol on January 6th. "I couldn’t just sit back on the sidelines any longer. I had to get involved." = = Marcus is sticking his neck out to fight on behalf of the people of Georgia’s 14th District and concerned Americans everywhere. Without your support, victory isn’t possible. We need your help to defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene. Thank you, Team Flowers for Congress | Marcus Flowers is a Democrat running to defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene. As an Army Veteran, Marcus understands the true meaning of service and patriotism and will work tirelessly to defeat the hatred of the alt-right. This election is going to be tough, but with the help of grassroots donors like you -- anything is possible. | = **** **** ****** ** ** **** Paid for by Marcus for Georgia Marcus for Georgia PO Box 725 Bremen, GA 30110 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please . ********=**

name: Matt
subject: It’s the economy, stupid.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Matt West for Congress
body:
I’m the man with a plan. | Friend, It doesn’t take a scientist with a Ph.D. to realize that Congress is out of touch with today’s modern economy. Automation is speeding up. Web 3.0 is upon us. Big Tech is stifling competition—driving up prices and invading our privacy. And organized labor is undercut and devalued while becoming ever more essential. Meanwhile, incredible opportunities to decentralize finance are shunned by a Congress that doesn’t understand the technology and is beholden to big banks. And on top of everything, our lawmakers are confused as ever about the basic functionality of the internet. I mean, have you seen them try to explain what a ‘finsta’ is? We’re doomed if we don’t make a radical change in the type of leadership we elect. **_[I’m an engineer who’s committed to building an economy that works for everyone through embracing new technologies and new ways of thinking. Will you chip in $25 or more to help me get the job done in 2022?>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39608238/320610298/2035722763?refcode=em_MW_FR_EconomyVision_121221_l1&amount=25&refcode2=f81774ba-a95b-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODE3NzRiYS1hOTViLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=svDEc3rRDy5huozEXRtqm_4X7eJU2XIYWXpOnUGiJLU=)_** Friend, how do you secure our digital infrastructure or create a practical jobs training program with no knowledge of computer programming or high-tech manufacturing? The answer is: you don’t. New technologies in the workplace can and should mean higher wages, more interesting jobs, and more time for leisure. There are amazing efficiencies just waiting to be implemented by a Congress that understands how things actually work. **_[I am running for Congress because 21st-century challenges require 21st-century solutions. name: Wade Herring HQ
subject: Wading across the District
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wade Herring for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/herring4congress [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/herring4congress]Good evening Peter,
Change starts with talking to people – and folks across the 1st District are ready to hear about better representation for Georgia.
Wade traveled to Pierce, Charlton, Ware, and Brantley Counties this week to share his message – that we deserve someone that represents our values in Washington.
First up – Wade spoke with the Editor-in-Chief of the Charlton County Herald about his candidacy, and the success of the campaign this fall.
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/91050/images/Copy%20of%20IMG_2291edit.jpg]Next – Wade met with local leaders in Pierce County to discuss his platform and his plans for the 1st District.
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/91050/images/Copy%20of%20IMG_2303edit.jpg]And stopped by for an interview with the Waycross Journal-Herald!
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/91050/images/Copy%20of%20IMG_2283edit.jpg]Closer to home, Wade met with members of the Savannah Regional Central Labor Council. Fair wages and protections for our nation's workers are a necessity, and we need to ensure everyone knows their rights to a safe workplace.
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/91050/images/Copy%20of%20IMG_2227edit.jpg]We are ready for this fight for new leadership – and we’re glad you’re with us.
Onward,
Wade Herring HQ
Support Wade [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/herring4congress?refcode=whem121221button]Wade Herring, lawyer and community volunteer, is running for Congress in Georgia’s First Congressional District. Wade grew up in Macon, Georgia. He has worked with the law firm of HunterMaclean since 1985. Among other volunteer positions, Wade has served as president of the Savannah Bar Association, chair of the trustees at Wesley Monumental United Methodist Church, and board member of Georgia Appleseed. Wade is a graduate of Dartmouth College and the University of Georgia School of Law.
Wade lives in Savannah, Georgia with his wife Susan of 39 years. Wade and Susan are the parents of two children, a son who is a lawyer in Atlanta, and a daughter who is a doctor in Winston-Salem, North Carolina.
www.WadeHerringForCongress.com [http://www.WadeHerringForCongress.com] | Info@WadeHerringForCongress.com
Emails are an important way for us to keep in touch with our supporters but if you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/8b3297c9-5a5b-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b/05beda1f-ab5b-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNWJlZGExZi1hYjViLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=frA-8ZVeFOM1-se-o9B3f4-Ey3ntvRDnYHeetsWbP_E=&id=127098231 .

body:
---

| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001FT1-Kd9qjY8j_PfFxo8Fqu5kOGxbn7mWA24lLnWQ4OcUk-40S_kmTOqoQcCFAOa9mU7h9AfAPd7acJ6vFQAmzMe_o2nTWeUhDh3FMVBBZV2xPCwV9_gifqFXMjbEgoh4mndDxrQvvhA3IIot3JCRXko1bbnMMPVQO7wRFmd9O69JGKy4T0AI4w==&c=Ihtpuo6HAC9zP04rOBdiRWcqDnkHbEsLyoyLSG060wO2-M6S9nf3vw==&ch=Lp2q1etKf1_KRvGqkpG7x_B1rP7vuduKZWs2MaVjqA5KO6EvpauGbg==)
---
| Whether it's Silicon Valley's indefinite banishment of President Trump, the FBI/DOJ's targeting of parents at school board meetings, or military members being locked in the brig for speaking out against fatal failures, the threats to our sacred First Amendment rights are piling up before our very eyes...
In times like these, a failure to act could mean the surrender of America and all the freedoms she affords FOREVER. So before it's too late, will you stand up for Free Speech right now?
