name: Catherine
subject: My hero
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
Dad taught me that with hard work and respect for others, I could overcome any obstacle and accomplish anything.
#
My Dad will always be my hero. After serving in the Army, he went to work parking cars on the Las Vegas Strip.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39608484/320617204/299165269?refcode=jr_em_nd_211212_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Henderson&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMDUxYWE4NS1hYzViLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cUNgAot2CmVi-kedY7qxEnOtuxZ8k0PidmtuD9H4x-8=)
He eventually worked his way up to become head of the Las Vegas Convention and Visitors Authority and helped build the city we know today. **Dad taught me that with hard work and respect for others, I could overcome any obstacle and accomplish anything.**
So I took my Dad’s lessons and dedicated my life to protecting and serving my community. I became Nevada’s Attorney General and took on the Big Banks that preyed on our communities during the financial crisis. Then, I overcame nearly $50 million spent to defeat me by Mitch McConnell and the GOP and became the first Latina and first woman from Nevada to ever be elected to the Senate. I won by just two points.
The fight ahead of us -- to keep Nevada blue and protect our razor-thin Senate majority -- will be even harder. New polling shows me 3 points behind my Trump-endorsed opponent. But with the work ethic I learned from my Dad, and your help, I _know_ we can win.
**[Please, will you split a donation between my campaign and Jacky Rosen to defend the Senate majority? CNN is now calling my race a top pickup opportunity for Republicans and new polling shows me losing>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39608485/320617205/299165269?refcode=jr_em_nd_211212_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Henderson&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMDUxYWE4NS1hYzViLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cUNgAot2CmVi-kedY7qxEnOtuxZ8k0PidmtuD9H4x-8=)**
The truth is, our Senate majority hinges on Nevada and the latest news on the ground is deeply concerning:
**FIRST:** My campaign started being massively outspent by GOP outside groups: Mitch McConnell’s allies poured over $3 million into attack ads to try and defeat me.
**THEN:** The Cook Political Report officially _downgraded_ my chances of winning and CNN called me one of the most vulnerable Senators up for re-election.
**NOW:** Recent polling shows me losing by 3 points, and as of today, I’m falling dangerously short of my rapid-response fundraising goal.
I urgently need your help to make up the gap before midnight. Falling short could cost me this race and could cost Democrats the Senate, so please: Can I count on you?
**[Before our midnight deadline, will you please rush a gift to split between my campaign and Jacky Rosen so we can win in Nevada and defend our Democratic Senate?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39608486/320617206/299165269?refcode=jr_em_nd_211212_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Henderson&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMDUxYWE4NS1hYzViLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cUNgAot2CmVi-kedY7qxEnOtuxZ8k0PidmtuD9H4x-8=)**
Thanks for giving what you can. Together, I know we can do this.
_¡La lucha sigue!_ The fight continues!
Catherine

**[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39608487/320617207/299165269?refcode=jr_em_nd_211212_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Henderson&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMDUxYWE4NS1hYzViLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cUNgAot2CmVi-kedY7qxEnOtuxZ8k0PidmtuD9H4x-8=)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from this email list: [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/9e197d32-1e5a-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b/c051aa85-ac5b-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMDUxYWE4NS1hYzViLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cUNgAot2CmVi-kedY7qxEnOtuxZ8k0PidmtuD9H4x-8=&id=105090150)

name: Izzi Levy
subject: [SIGNATURE REQUESTED] Protect Roe v. Wade
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=1685%2E3611125%2EKDdTvG ][IMG]

Folks—

Everyone deserves the right to make their own health care decisions. Full
stop.

But last week the Supreme Court heard arguments in a case that could
overturn Roe v. Wade and wipe away decades of progress in the fight for
reproductive rights. Dobbs v. Jackson Women’s Health Organization is the
biggest threat to abortion rights in decades.

In the House, Tim Ryan proudly voted to pass the Women's Health Protection
Act to codify Roe v. Wade. Now, we need YOUR help pushing it through the
Senate.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/signup/EM_BS_RYA_211212_EN_ProtectRoe_A0_na_U1_X1_M1?t=1007&akid=1685%2E3611125%2EKDdTvG ]We need the Senate to pass this bill NOW to protect access to safe,
legal abortion. Will you join our campaign in calling on the Senate to act
ASAP on the Women’s Health Protection Act?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/signup/EM_BS_RYA_211212_EN_ProtectRoe_A0_na_U1_X1_M1?t=1010&amount=25&akid=1685%2E3611125%2EKDdTvG ]Add your name >>

Trump and McConnell made it their mission to pack the courts with
anti-choice justices hand-picked by the far-right so they could do away
with reproductive freedoms.

Now right-wing politicians around the country are calling for Roe v. Wade
to be overturned—and they just might get their wish. If they succeed, Ohio
could be one of the first states to ban abortion outright with an extreme
bill that goes even further than the law that passed in Texas. We can’t
let that happen.

We must pass legislation that codifies Roe and takes politicians out of
our health care decisions. [ https://act.timforoh.com/signup/EM_BS_RYA_211212_EN_ProtectRoe_A0_na_U1_X1_M1?t=1008&akid=1685%2E3611125%2EKDdTvG ]If you agree, folks, sign your
name right now to help us protect the right to choose.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/signup/EM_BS_RYA_211212_EN_ProtectRoe_A0_na_U1_X1_M1?t=1011&amount=25&akid=1685%2E3611125%2EKDdTvG ]Count me in >>

In solidarity,

Izzi Levy
Communications Director
Tim Ryan for Senate

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/47?t=1002&akid=1685%2E3611125%2EKDdTvG ][IMG]

touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails,

name: Personal note from Val Demings
subject: My story
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
It's important for me to share this with you. Friend: This is a longer but especially important email about why I'm running for Senate. It's important for me to share my story with you and why this campaign means so much to me. I hope you'll give it a read.

I was raised in Jacksonville, FL – and I've got to say, when you grow up in the South poor, Black and female, you've got to have faith. It's something I learned from my parents. Mom was a maid, Dad was a janitor, and my goodness they worked hard. And although we didn't have a lot of money – although life was tough sometimes – we had each other. We had love. We had faith. I've carried that spirit with me my entire career.

That faith that things can get better, that we can do some good in the world, inspired me to get into public service. In fact, my mom used to say to me: "Never grow tired of doing good, Val – never tire." And so for me, growing tired was never an option. It's what pushed me to become the first in my family to graduate college. It's also what pushed me to serve 27 years in the Orlando Police Department, where eventually I became the first woman to lead the department. And it pushed me to run for Congress and represent my community.

I will never tire of the opportunities to do good or the challenges to tackle before me, and I'm asking you to do the same. Pitch in a contribution of $5 or more now to help me defeat Marco Rubio, win in Florida and defend our Senate majority.

Never tire. These are the words that resonate in my mind each and every day that I serve the people of Florida's 10th District in Congress. They've stuck with me as I've fought to put an end to gun violence, especially as the horror of that violence struck our district at Pulse Nightclub in Orlando. We mourned, deeply. But we resolved to fight for change, to never tire – and I won't stop until long-overdue action on gun violence is finally realized.

Never tire, I said to myself as I took on a habitual offender who occupied the most powerful office in the world: President Donald Trump. Unlike some in Washington, I never tire of standing up for what I believe is right, and I carried that with me as I fought to impeach him, because no one is above the law.

This is my story, friend: Only in America can a little Black girl, the daughter of a maid and a janitor growing up in the South in the '60s, have a story so filled with opportunities like these. Now, I'm ready to meet a new moment, to do more good for Floridians. I am ready to be the next U.S. senator for Florida – and together, with you never tiring alongside me, I know we can win.

So I need your support, friend. This campaign is a battle of many things, and an unfortunate reality among them is resources. The Republican Party is already proving they will spend whatever it takes to protect Marco Rubio, so if you're with me, if you want to elect Florida's first Black senator and defend our majority in the Senate, please donate $5 or whatever you can right now.

https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/vd_senate-fr-email?refcode=jtk1935-fr-text

Thank you for being in this with me. Never tire.

Val Demings
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

Email is an important way for us to keep this team informed about campaign updates. clean_body: It's important for me to share this with you. Friend: This is a longer but especially important email about why I'm running for Senate. It's important for me to share my story with you and why this campaign means so much to me. I hope you'll give it a read. I was raised in Jacksonville, FL – and I've got to say, when you grow up in the South poor, Black and female, you've got to have faith. It's something I learned from my parents. Mom was a maid, Dad was a janitor, and my goodness they worked hard. And although we didn't have a lot of money – although life was tough sometimes – we had each other. We had love. We had faith. I've carried that spirit with me my entire career. That faith that things can get better, that we can do some good in the world, inspired me to get into public service. In fact, my mom used to say to me: "Never grow tired of doing good, Val – never tire." And so for me, growing tired was never an option. It's what pushed me to become the first in my family to graduate college. It's also what pushed me to serve 27 years in the Orlando Police Department, where eventually I became the first woman to lead the department. And it pushed me to run for Congress and represent my community. I will never tire of the opportunities to do good or the challenges to tackle before me, and I'm asking you to do the same. Pitch in a contribution of $5 or more now to help me defeat Marco Rubio, win in Florida and defend our Senate majority. Never tire. These are the words that resonate in my mind each and every day that I serve the people of Florida's 10th District in Congress. They've stuck with me as I've fought to put an end to gun violence, especially as the horror of that violence struck our district at Pulse Nightclub in Orlando. We mourned, deeply. But we resolved to fight for change, to never tire – and I won't stop until long-overdue action on gun violence is finally realized. Never tire, I said to myself as I took on a habitual offender who occupied the most powerful office in the world: President Donald Trump. Unlike some in Washington, I never tire of standing up for what I believe is right, and I carried that with me as I fought to impeach him, because no one is above the law. This is my story, friend: Only in America can a little Black girl, the daughter of a maid and a janitor growing up in the South in the '60s, have a story so filled with opportunities like these. Now, I'm ready to meet a new moment, to do more good for Floridians. I am ready to be the next U.S. senator for Florida – and together, with you never tiring alongside me, I know we can win. So I need your support, friend. This campaign is a battle of many things, and an unfortunate reality among them is resources. The Republican Party is already proving they will spend whatever it takes to protect Marco Rubio, so if you're with me, if you want to elect Florida's first Black senator and defend our majority in the Senate, please donate $5 or whatever you can right now. Thank you for being in this with me. Never tire. Val Demings

body:
**It 's time to FIRE FAUCI!** **[Chip in if you agree! >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58990744:JrorBkETN:m:1:3253819041:7B8D24CEF6E1B23926517F0A91BD68C3:r)** __ | |
---
Peter,

Here's something Washington won't want you to hear: even the scientist who discovered the omicron variant has called the Biden/Fauci travel ban a "hysterical overreach."

**_The doctor who discovered the new variant wrote an op-ed this week that said that so far, no one's been hospitalized in South Africa. So far, no one's died from this disease. _**

_That 's what I just talked about on Fox News. [**WATCH NOW**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58990744:JrorBkETN:m:1:3253819041:7B8D24CEF6E1B23926517F0A91BD68C3:r)_[** _ >>_**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58990744:JrorBkETN:m:1:3253819041:7B8D24CEF6E1B23926517F0A91BD68C3:r)

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58990744:JrorBkETN:m:1:3253819041:7B8D24CEF6E1B23926517F0A91BD68C3:r)
The truth is that the hysterical power-hungry bureaucrats in charge of public health - like Dr. Fauci - don't want you to know what's really happening. They want you scared. They want you to be compliant. And apparently, they want you skipping Christmas unless you line up for a booster.

They want to create fear. They want to indulge hysteria. They want to destroy the economy while they're doing it. These are the last people we need in charge. That's why I'm leading the effort to FIRE FAUCI and restore common sense. Will you join my fight by chipping in now?
__

The so-called experts have proven too many times that they have no idea what they're doing.

They don't care about COVID - they care about power!

And it's about time we say ENOUGH IS ENOUGH.

It's time for Fauci TO GO before we lose any more time or freedom listening to his hysterical lies.

I have been fighting to dismiss Fauci for a while now, but I know more than ever I can't do it alone.

**I hope you'll chip in now to join the fight:[https://secure.winred.com/randpaul/action-3357636/](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58990744:JrorBkETN:m:1:3253819041:7B8D24CEF6E1B23926517F0A91BD68C3:r)**

In Liberty,
Rand Paul

name: Jason Lee, Beto for Texas
subject: One of the most powerful ways to be a part of this campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
This race is going to be one of the closest elections ever held in Texas.
#
Recent polls showing Beto and Greg Abbott in a dead heat are an urgent reminder: we have a LOT of work ahead of us if we’re going to win this race.
And in order to reach folks in all 254 Texas counties by Election Day, we need to make critical investments **now** — not later.
One of the most powerful ways you can be a part of this campaign is **by pledging a monthly donation.** Unlike one-time donations, a monthly recurring gift is a commitment that empowers us to plan our campaign budget in much greater detail, ensuring we can win as many votes across Texas as possible.
**Will you please kick off a monthly contribution right now to support Beto through Election Day? It would mean a lot to us if you join our incredible team of recurring donors who will fuel this campaign in 2022.**
[Yes, I’ll start a monthly donation →](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/50429?refcode=ema20211212-166643&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=166643%2E444211%2E5Fa_jc)

Thanks to incredible grassroots supporters like you, we’re building a powerful campaign across Texas to elect Beto as our next Governor. Beto has already met with voters and held events in over a dozen counties since launching less than one month ago, and we’re just getting started.
But with new polls confirming that this race will be one of the most competitive elections in Texas history, and Abbott spending millions to keep his grip on power, I’m asking if you will take the next step.
If enough of our supporters today step up to pledge $5, $10, or $25 monthly, it will make a _dramatic_ difference to our campaign to elect Beto.
[Please, help us do so much more in 2022 by setting up a small-dollar monthly donation to our campaign today. ](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/50429?refcode=ema20211212-166643&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=166643%2E444211%2E5Fa_jc)

Thank you for being in this fight,
Jason Lee

name: Josh Harder
subject: My story with childhood asthma
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Harder for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/mO9Tdf94oIpotapx6wVAbgBF-u5tbSCzgkBYSPYu16s=/ZjTUd3r08Ch77kvuSrZEtCv1kBnVgrodEgVQVHBP6D8=?refcode=E12902-20211212-ChildhoodAsthma-header-EnvironmentClimate-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=22) | Peter, Something you may not know about me is that growing up, I had childhood asthma. I still remember the anxiety of double and triple checking I had packed my inhaler for school. I didn't fully realize it back then, but I wasn't alone. **In fact 1 in 6 kids in California 's Central Valley struggle with childhood asthma.** Crazy right? It's a huge problem in my community and the recent wildfires have made it even worse. When I throw out stats like - the number of "smoke days" has nearly tripled over the last decade - it's not just a number to me. That has real-life consequences for thousands of kids who, just like me, struggle to breathe. That's why I have been urging President Biden so strongly to focus not just on the wildfires, but also the tragic effects of the smoke. For example one of the proposals I'm pushing is a technology that provides the public up to the minute updates on the locations of wildfires and the smoke they create. It helps firefighters track the fires and helps parents understand how bad the smoke is for their kids. Our kids deserve better than the air they're currently breathing. We have to tackle climate change head on and that's why I'm so determined to continue leading this fight in Washington. We can do it!
Josh

[**P.S. If you agree we need to tackle climate change head on, please consider donating to our campaign.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/mO9Tdf94oIpotapx6wVAbgBF-u5tbSCzgkBYSPYu16s=/ZjTUd3r08Ch77kvuSrZEtCv1kBnVgrodEgVQVHBP6D8=?refcode=E12902-20211212-ChildhoodAsthma-SL-EnvironmentClimate-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=22) [DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/mO9Tdf94oIpotapx6wVAbgBF-u5tbSCzgkBYSPYu16s=/ZjTUd3r08Ch77kvuSrZEtCv1kBnVgrodEgVQVHBP6D8=?refcode=E12902-20211212-ChildhoodAsthma-SB-EnvironmentClimate-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=22)
---
* * *

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/mO9Tdf94oIpotapx6wVAbgBF-u5tbSCzgkBYSPYu16s=/T5-r6pjrikglk3WSnKtaLZ3NgtfRy0JcGUkcGrf1vtw=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/mO9Tdf94oIpotapx6wVAbgBF-u5tbSCzgkBYSPYu16s=/egksrf6dLAQakKbHqZ9QCywcDWrJ_ET8G69Ywar4tV4=)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because CA-10 is one of our nation's most pivotal tossup districts. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, we understand. You can click [**here**](https://act.myngp.com/el/mO9Tdf94oIpotapx6wVAbgBF-u5tbSCzgkBYSPYu16s=/XKo7c79WLxAl5wt-ILVqspN1lWP2G4B-C3uQnthPAZ0=?recipientId=JGP1LIgKX8KYGR8WifkGL1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com) to get only the most important updates, or you can [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/mO9Tdf94oIpotapx6wVAbgBF-u5tbSCzgkBYSPYu16s=/W9uSPfdGM1dF9-OoQpacXsFpgHNqld7TdaTl7FNaYKY=) here.
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/mO9Tdf94oIpotapx6wVAbgBF-u5tbSCzgkBYSPYu16s=/ZjTUd3r08Ch77kvuSrZEtCv1kBnVgrodEgVQVHBP6D8=?refcode=E12902-20211212-ChildhoodAsthma-footer-EnvironmentClimate-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=22)
[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/mO9Tdf94oIpotapx6wVAbgBF-u5tbSCzgkBYSPYu16s=/ZjTUd3r08Ch77kvuSrZEtCv1kBnVgrodEgVQVHBP6D8=?refcode=E12902-20211212-ChildhoodAsthma-footer-EnvironmentClimate-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=22)

Josh and his wife Pam live in Turlock where Josh grew up and delivered newspapers for the Turlock Journal. Josh was re-elected to Congress on behalf of families in the Central Valley where he's fighting to hold our government accountable, pass COVID-19 relief, and deliver on our progressive values. **[Will you help him keep up the fight in Congress by making a contribution today?](https://act.myngp.com/el/mO9Tdf94oIpotapx6wVAbgBF-u5tbSCzgkBYSPYu16s=/ZjTUd3r08Ch77kvuSrZEtCv1kBnVgrodEgVQVHBP6D8=?refcode=E12902-20211212-ChildhoodAsthma-footer-EnvironmentClimate-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=22)**

body:

name: Tobias Read
subject: Let’s talk education
body:
Will you please take a minute to tell me about your education priorities?
---
| | Dear Peter,

The future of our state rests on the success of our kids, full stop. So much has happened in education over the last two years, and nobody knows for certain what it’s going to take to bring our kids back up to speed. I’ve started laying out a strong education agenda for Oregon, but I also want to hear your thoughts on your education priorities.

[**Will you please take a minute to tell me about your education priorities and share your feedback on mine?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39608939/320631035/190966719?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTExMzNhMy1iNTViLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sYYtt4maOZE0mBysutj59YAefiUeV86rhz3M-DBHisA=&emci=56355b94-b15b-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=691133a3-b55b-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=30662126)

I mean it when I say that we’ll measure our success by how our kids are doing. As Governor, I’ll keep tabs on a wide array of factors that influence how well our students learn. Things like performance in math and reading at grade level, food and housing insecurity, and access to healthcare are all indicators of how well we’re doing.

More than that, it will show everyone in Oregon exactly what the needs are for our kids and their families. Transparent, thoughtful, and participatory. That’s how government should be. [**I want to start that now with your feedback on education priorities.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39608940/320631036/190966719?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTExMzNhMy1iNTViLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sYYtt4maOZE0mBysutj59YAefiUeV86rhz3M-DBHisA=&emci=56355b94-b15b-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=691133a3-b55b-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=30662126)

Thank you,

---

name: Marco Lopez
subject: Arizona is a state for everyone
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Lopez for Governor Authorized by Marco Lopez
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39609033/320631656/-1212862284?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk346-su-nd-v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZWM0YzVmZS1iZDViLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yL5WoFrWa6gIQjeZOSZrYzQ_6Cp3GhndZUpbJ4clug8=&emci=5d35b8f1-2d59-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=1ec4c5fe-bd5b-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=6085109)
---
Friend, I'm a child of immigrants and a proud Arizonan.

My parents believed in the promise of Arizona: that _anyone _can be part of making our future brighter. Their belief motivated me to become the youngest mayor of my hometown, join the Obama administration, and build a small business. Now, I'm running to be Arizona's first Latino governor in almost 50 years.
**I've gotten to where I am today in part because I grew up recognizing the power of our diversity and embracing the unique contributions we each make to our shared future. But our current leaders don't have that vision.**
Arizona's GOP extremists have rolled back the promise of our state by pushing racist voter suppression laws and stifling opportunities for people who don’t look like them to get ahead. It's disgraceful – and it's counterintuitive. **How can we all be our best if we aren't all welcomed into Arizona's future?**
**That's why I'm running to be a governor who leads with inclusivity and integrity – and why I want to hear what YOU think before our campaign's official poll closes at 11:59 p.m. tonight. So please, let me know:**
| | **DO YOU THINK ARIZONA'S GOVERNMENT SHOULD REFLECT THE DIVERSITY OF OUR STATE?**
---

Their belief motivated me to become the youngest mayor of my hometown, join the Obama administration, and build a small business. Now, I'm running to be Arizona's first Latino governor in almost 50 years. I've gotten to where I am today in part because I grew up recognizing the power of our diversity and embracing the unique contributions we each make to our shared future. But our current leaders don't have that vision. Arizona's GOP extremists have rolled back the promise of our state by pushing racist voter suppression laws and stifling opportunities for people who don’t look like them to get ahead. It's disgraceful – and it's counterintuitive. How can we all be our best if we aren't all welcomed into Arizona's future? That's why I'm running to be a governor who leads with inclusivity and integrity – and why I want to hear what YOU think before our campaign's official poll closes at 11:59 p.m. tonight. name: Team Schmidt
subject: This week in Review
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC
body:
This week, Kansas and America mourned the loss of Senator Bob Dole. As Derek said last Sunday upon the announcement of his passing: “America has los Friend, This week, Kansas and America mourned the loss of Senator Bob Dole. As Derek said last Sunday upon the announcement of his passing: _“America has lost a national hero and Kansas a favorite son. A powerful example of the courage and integrity of the Greatest Generation, Senator Dole dedicated his life - in the military and in elected office - to selfless service to his beloved country and his fellow Americans. Jennifer's and my prayers are with the family of this extraordinary person. God bless America.”_ Senator Dole was an inspiration to us all here at Team Schmidt. Virtually every Kansas Republican for decades can trace roots in politics back to him in some form, and that will continue to be the case for many years. We are so thankful to have known him and to have been blessed with his leadership and example as, above all, a proud Kansan from Russell. A legendary sharp wit, Senator Dole left us with both the simple, powerful inspiration of his faith and a final joke in a letter read by his daughter at his funeral service at Washington National Cathedral: "_As I make the final walk on my life’s journey, I do so without fear. Because I know that I will, again, not be walking alone. I know that God will be walking with me. I also confess that I’m a bit curious to learn and find if I am correct in thinking that heaven will look a lot like Kansas and to see, like others who have gone before me, if I will still be able to vote in Chicago_." In many ways, Senator Dole’s early endorsement this past summer put our campaign in the strong position we are in today. We will forever be grateful for his encouragement and support, and we will miss him. ### We also want to share with you the new list of leaders from across Kansas who this past week joined in endorsing Derek Schmidt for Governor. _ _ Check out what each endorser had to say about Derek: _“Attorney General Derek Schmidt has my support for Governor. He will bring back to that office a respect for the Law of God, our Constitution, and the people of Kansas.”_ **_State Representative Francis Awerkamp_** _“I enthusiastically endorse our current Attorney General Derek Schmidt as our next Governor of Kansas. Attorney General Schmidt is a proactive proponent for Kansas and has been a staunch defender of the rights of all Kansans. As a fifth generation Kansan, Derek has a deep understanding of issues across the state. He is building a legacy of leadership that has and will guarantee a brighter future for us and our children.”_ **_State Representative Mike Dodson_** _“Derek Schmidt has proven to be a great friend of law enforcement throughout his tenure as attorney general. His commonsense approach to the issues and his steady hand approach to leadership are qualities that will serve the state well when he is our governor. He has my full support and I encourage all Kansans to vote for Derek Schmidt next November.”_ **_Barton County Sheriff Brian Bellendir_** _"As a father of five boys, three of whom are still in Kansas public schools, making sure they receive the best education possible is my highest priority. Under Laura Kelly, who was the first governor in America to shut our schools down, fewer high school students are meeting benchmarks and more controversial lesson plans are being uncovered each day. We need a governor like Derek Schmidt who has committed to ensuring our students are well-equipped for the modern workforce and that parents have the ultimate say in what their kids are being taught. I'm proud to endorse him and confident he's going to be a great pro-education governor of Kansas."_ **_Former Mayor of Gardner Steve Shute_** It’s clear that strong momentum is building in support of Derek Schmidt to be our next Governor. But we need every single Kansas Patriot to help us get across the finish line next year. [**Will you join Team Schmidt today?**](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=bfca9962092341cfba340d49d09157b9&_e=GSpkaZbyt4k0G0Sy2Ppl-5SPreMcGysCIvQQUci8n0-aLBsZh8carcqkvioxW8fIrxB35Chf3PXeycGy6uHgJIpF5-t8stdIm9ipXIurNv5HA-dbo4IfYDZKUjz1txLbRLPz6DlOQZuuTWa-kduaGVUOZ-n8yZJUmlzThtmd1kNcLfTBrVUF39agLZcTO5Ruc8AgNGz3hLNpANLZtpqRu7EecMQqCS8b6O0Ki6RTZnu-TxXtR1VT2klpDvHaQoDAlFdIZpzqurqzPLcYFN7Zn4Db_7bBjDIkLoFRjrC5SQyqOuO3_S-lnKUV84gIZ1JLJXKNusA3-_WtnIkUzBu2E9g5tBVakNkbYgTXVSq8GGHE4R-k3i0Ihpfklyioc-Eoh_2Xfv2MEFj99UgzZf9D9D5OZF-eZMM0OQMgL4obRISq65Ntfy6lLOGbRSTXhdlYKdpi3XbsVHLnlyRJmWCmUH6W4gDPvfV1-IbBzsSXrI4%3D) [**WIN WITH DEREK**](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=bfca9962092341cfba340d49d09157b9&_e=GSpkaZbyt4k0G0Sy2Ppl-5SPreMcGysCIvQQUci8n0-aLBsZh8carcqkvioxW8fIrxB35Chf3PXeycGy6uHgJIpF5-t8stdIm9ipXIurNv5HA-dbo4IfYDZKUjz1txLbRLPz6DlOQZuuTWa-kduaGVUOZ-n8yZJUmlzThtmd1kNcLfTBrVUF39agLZcTO5Ruc8AgNGz3hLNpANLZtpqRu7EecMQqCS8b6O0Ki6RTZnu-TxXtR1VT2klpDvHaQoDAlFdIZpzqurqzPLcYFN7Zn64n-9yVzjb2whxmCI_dnj4swdBmFFVbQn13HOLprW71R6bTtA3OHQumHVCuw7URPXAGctaEA8lXaEiILAEO6nbjtdKU2uOrUfuZY1h6vy67PVr_4NNguNYzCgoeXjmC05egyHBPpgRnzYYVIM8HOIblm6Dviukw83U1zzSCeA33T_Q2FNCstu9JYCNpR3o2B8_DUnOocEJ2sdEOOTIvCcc%3D) Thanks, Team Schmidt | |

name: Pramila Jayapal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
Peter,
We have to fight for every dollar of funding for housing, education, health care, and taking on climate change. But last week, the House approved $768 billion in annual military spending.
Here’s the bottom line: **Investments in our people and communities should come before bloated military spending.** Yet, a bipartisan majority in Congress just voted to INCREASE defense spending to an amount that is more than Donald Trump’s last Pentagon budget. That is completely upside down.
I voted against this excessive budget because it’s a giveaway to defense contractors and giant corporations, all while millions of people in this country have to struggle without health care, affordable housing, and fully funded schools.
Here’s another bottom line: **We don’t need to give the military MORE money than we gave to it under Trump.** Part of undoing the damage Trump did in office is spending our energy and federal dollars battling climate change, strengthening the social safety net, and expanding health care. Congress should not be wasting money on military bloat.
That’s why I’ve championed a 10 percent cut to military spending AND fought so hard to invest in health care, education, paid leave, housing, and the fight against climate change in the Build Back Better Act.
[**If you’re with me FOR investments in the people and AGAINST excessive spending on defense contractors and the military, help me fight back with a $3 contribution today.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/9017?refcode=em20211212-871&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=871%2E420207%2EV__NIF)
**[Chip in $3 »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/9017?refcode=em20211212-871&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=871%2E420207%2EV__NIF)**
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20211212-871-footer&t=21&refcode2=871_420207_V__NIF&akid=871%2E420207%2EV__NIF)**

Republicans have been waiting nearly _50 years_ to overturn _Roe v. Wade_ \-- and after last week's arguments, the GOP may actually get their wish.

The Supreme Court's ruling in this case will decide whether anti-choice bills in state legislatures across the nation will be allowed to go into effect and DISMANTLE reproductive freedoms -- **but we can’t give up on this fight.**

Justice Sotomayor was 100% right when she said that the impact of banning abortion would be "catastrophic," so we need to prove that Americans will make their voices heard to save _Roe._

If you stand with Justice Sotomayor **we need you to raise your voice RIGHT NOW.**

**[Don’t wait another minute: Sign our Democratic petition calling on the Supreme Court to DEFEND reproductive rights! We're only 13,207 signatures short, and we're counting on YOU:](https://go.dscc.org/go/5681?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-ND-20211212-SupremeCourtUpdate-jtk1914-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20211212-SupremeCourtUpdate-jtk1914-Pros-sl1&akid=2197%2E9716520%2E9Ql1m3)**

**_Please help us reach 100,000 signatures by midnight:_**[](https://go.dscc.org/go/5681?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-ND-20211212-SupremeCourtUpdate-jtk1914-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20211212-SupremeCourtUpdate-jtk1914-Pros-sl1&akid=2197%2E9716520%2E9Ql1m3)

subject: I’m tired of men policing our words
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Melanie Darrigo
body:
| | | Senator Josh Hawley is complaining that Democrats’ chosen "rhetoric" around the potential destruction of Roe v. Wade is _"dangerous."_
**I'm tired of men policing our words when we protest against them controlling our bodies.**
I'll fight back against these anti-choice efforts to silence us by codifying _Roe_ and expanding the Supreme Court.
[**Can you chip in $10 or more to my pro-choice campaign for Congress today?**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xvsu9hCVaerzAxagfczWNtn6NzOqr_NZeqQZkVxfkp1A4nhXqkyXZ2IpB9KsF0uFZ7cf83AWwSCBzgi-wybI8cQ5093CjohJ8Ff2r2-l1FLqNvF0dWizu68GE6oPSsHfJ8wvK7Mbbw9eqyTS0mnf_Er3JTq2Zpcmmm0L1yOLi4V7ccSwlDLzhjRsNkNqXI4Y0VjVziVUhxVW2chlaNQ7cFsNI1SS4TLSyvnUsRj41a2AWqSQuig9Y8nKhZRR5ihB9F72SOMGkVeTyDlVLzgONn0CzdqvHE_DIWSQFnBVwQZUjEA3cmmNzLOw7Je2sRPQOB3EpjPIShDlqJU02hRRd1Xba-m-nK4W_bwDLh2QyTYECzlwCJ1_6IdE19cls-lFI/3hs/7bSkCzKfS1WX72nH3zZTiQ/h0/ttAhtdpSWd59GuBzhnh1pDtwObrKmrw4iozTgcLf3fY)

In a House speech, Cawthorn referred to women as “earthen vessels” as if our only purpose on this earth is to procreate.
This rhetoric is what’s actually dangerous. **
** **In Congress, I will always fight back against misogyny. I’m running for office to uplift women everywhere.**
[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xvsu9hCVaerzAxagfczWNtn6NzOqr_NZeqQZkVxfkp1A4nhXqkyXZ2IpB9KsF0uFZ7cf83AWwSCBzgi-wybI8cJwBolLfbLQlYJ5uvJJjDTtMgR3Y3XZP65nQZeEDFjQ2prhbs7H_CbjKjbDX2rgSaYSVWDctULRFsmGWdR2T2SP23FWvFLxDFzxLvttJoVGkkfbxPdGdDFT-PkgFP_Q2JiY7VV94VTEhbMbEr2CzAU8XG51JKHNx-cBWSRjVs23f2CRq4rC-qik5--TFX6Gelcvla-yVZtKu6sYax83iZSXstvzsnJhyALUdkubeaJpwyxl7cYHKzzwatYKi448eTgDuaYhHvz3p3HUPzNiH6JBERt52kf6oNG0UKWhQkmtg/3hs/7bSkCzKfS1WX72nH3zZTiQ/h2/pja1jj8PCx6UFPzpN-CdLATfmFQzcT3fDLmUgG1pnA0)

clean_body: | | | Senator Josh Hawley is complaining that Democrats’ chosen "rhetoric" around the potential destruction of Roe v. Wade is "dangerous." I'm tired of men policing our words when we protest against them controlling our bodies. I'll fight back against these anti-choice efforts to silence us by codifying Roe and expanding the Supreme Court. While Hawley is concerned about progressives standing up to protect our most basic reproductive rights, his friend Madison Cawthorn has some choice words. In a House speech, Cawthorn referred to women as “earthen vessels” as if our only purpose on this earth is to procreate. This rhetoric is what’s actually dangerous. In Congress, I will always fight back against misogyny. I’m running for office to uplift women everywhere. That’s why I’ve earned the endorsements of Indivisible, National Organization for Women, Progressive Women of NY, Her Bold Move, Matriarch, Moms in Office and Brand New Congress. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your payment will go through immediately. | | ---|--- | | Thanks for standing up. \-- Melanie is a mother of three and healthcare advocate running for New York's 3rd District on Medicare for All and the Green New Deal. Our movement isn't taking a dime of corporate PAC money, which means we need your support. If you’d rather contribute by check, feel free to make the check out to the following address: Friends of Melanie Darrigo P.O. Box 312 Port Washington, NY 11050 Paid for by Friends of Melanie Darrigo | | Sent via . name: Cheri Beasley
subject: I’ve never backed down from a tough fight, and I won’t now.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
My mom taught me from a very young age that, with hard work and faith, I could do anything.
#

Friends -
My mom taught me from a very young age that, with hard work and faith, I could do anything.
She dedicated her life to service and instilled in me my own commitment to service.
From taking me to knock doors starting at age six to volunteering in my church and community to choosing a path of service, my mom has always guided me — and her example still does today.
I have been led throughout my life by not only this commitment to service but also a pursuit of justice — it’s what’s guided me during my career, first as a public defender, later a judge, and eventually as Chief Justice.
When my very first opponent told people that I couldn’t win because I was a mom, I grabbed the diaper bag, put my twins Matthew and Thomas in the stroller, and knocked on every door that I could. We won that race by 30 points.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-dec21?refcode=em211212-1-t1r&refcode2=124.357359.U0Vc8q&t=1&akid=124%2E357359%2EU0Vc8q)
That’s the same fighting spirit I’m bringing to this race and that I’ll bring as your next senator. It will be tough. But I’ve never backed down from a tough fight, and I won’t now.
**[If you're ready to flip North Carolina, can you make a $3 donation to our campaign today? Every donation matters because each one sends a message that you believe that we can win North Carolina and win real change for the people of this country.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-dec21?refcode=em211212-1-t1r&refcode2=124.357359.U0Vc8q&t=2&akid=124%2E357359%2EU0Vc8q)**

subject: USPS service PLUMMETING
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
DO YOU AGREE WITH KATIE PORTER? >>
| | | [QUICKLY: DO YOU THINK LOUIS DEJOY SHOULD BE FIRED?](https://links.e.dccc.) We're FIRED UP.

Rep. Katie Porter just delivered a **STUNNING** rebuke of Trump's hand-picked postmaster general, Louis DeJoy:

[](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/gpgkTRzLVkc~)

Katie Porter is absolutely right.

Since becoming postmaster general, DeJoy has **SABOTAGED** mail-in voting for the GOP's political benefit \-- _and even enacted a plan to make mail delivery**PERMANENTLY** slower_.

It's OUTRAGEOUS. And on this pivotal issue, we need to know if our best grassroots supporters agree with Katie Porter.

**So let us know: Do you agree that Postmaster General Louis DeJoy should be FIRED?** [SUBMIT YOUR RESPONSE: DO YOU AGREE WITH KATIE PORTER? >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Eqxzt_)
---

Thank you,

DCCC

name: Charles Booker
subject: How You Can Help Tornado Victims
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Peter, when the
storm hits, family stands together.

Kentucky has been devastated by a historic storm, and it is critical we
stand together to provide the aid our families need. My campaign is
dedicating all of our energy to doing just that.

If you are as heartbroken by the images coming out of Kentucky as I am,
please join me in helping those impacted. My team has compiled a list of
some of the organizations leading disaster relief efforts across our
Commonwealth below.

Disaster Relief Funds

* [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/13927?t=1001&akid=1328%2E346206%2EyVph2o ]Team Western Kentucky Tornado Relief Fund
* [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/13928?t=1002&akid=1328%2E346206%2EyVph2o ]United Way of Kentucky
* [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/13929?t=1003&akid=1328%2E346206%2EyVph2o ]Disaster Relief At Work
* [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/13930?t=1004&akid=1328%2E346206%2EyVph2o ]Aspire Appalachia

If you live in Kentucky

Donate Blood:

* Kentucky Red Cross: Find your local blood bank [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/13931?t=1005&akid=1328%2E346206%2EyVph2o ]here
* Kentucky Blood Center: Find a drive [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/13932?t=1006&akid=1328%2E346206%2EyVph2o ]here

Donate Food:

* [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/13933?t=1007&akid=1328%2E346206%2EyVph2o ]Hope 2 All Food Pantry, 307 W. Mose Rager Blvd. Drakesboro, KY
42337
* [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/13934?t=1008&akid=1328%2E346206%2EyVph2o ]Community Kitchen, 1237 Martin Luther King Jr Drive, Paducah, KY
* [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/13935?t=1009&akid=1328%2E346206%2EyVph2o ]Dare to Care Food Bank

Donate Supplies:

*Suggested donations include gas for generators, flash lights, head lamps,
batteries, utility gloves, water, gas cans, socks, undergarments,
blankets, coats, warm clothes, shoes, toiletries, feminine hygiene
products, baby formula, and non-perishable food. .

* [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/13936?t=1010&akid=1328%2E346206%2EyVph2o ]The Johnson Bar, 133 S. 3rd St. Paducah, KY. 42001 (9 a.m. to 5
p.m.)
* Newport Fire Department, 998 Monmouth St, Newport, KY 41071
* Walnut Grove Baptist Church, 2941 Highland Lick Rd, Russellville, KY
* [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/13937?t=1011&akid=1328%2E346206%2EyVph2o ]Stepstone Family and Youth Services, 78 Caky Dr, Benton, KY, (270)
527-8388
* [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/13938?t=1012&akid=1328%2E346206%2EyVph2o ]Marshall County Exceptional Center, 198 Old Symsonia Rd, Benton,
KY, (270)252-6530
* [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/13939?t=1013&akid=1328%2E346206%2EyVph2o ]Akridge Farm Supply, 724 Fairview Ave, Eddyville, KY 42038,
(270)388-2910 – Looking specifically for tarps and gas cans
* Cave City Community Center (Senior Center), 105 Duke St, Cave City, KY
42127
* [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/13940?t=1014&akid=1328%2E346206%2EyVph2o ]Paducah Beer Werks, 301 N 4th St, Paducah, KY 42001
* Louisville Donation Collection, 1011 Carlisle Ave, Louisville, KY
40215 (truck will deliver to western Kentucky on Sunday, Dec. 12)
* Jamestown City Park Batting Cages, 123 Park Ave, Jamestown, KY 42629
(drop off from 2 p.m. – 6 p.m. Saturday through Thursday)

Our Western Kentucky family needs our help. Please join us and sign up to
help. Anything you can do will make a difference.

I love you Kentucky,

Charles Booker

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1328%2E346206%2EyVph2o

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
